  \wordsense{a. 勇敢的，英勇的}
  \wordexample{valiant soldier（勇敢的战士）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[**]{valid}{'vælid}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 VAL[VAIL]}
  \wordsense{a. 有效的；有根据的；正当的}
  \wordexample{valid for six months（六个月内有效） raise valid objections（提出有根据的异议）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[**]{validity}{və'lidəti}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 VAL[VAIL]}
  \wordsense{n. 正当性；有效性；效力}
  \wordexample{validate（使生效）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[***]{valour}{'vælə(r)}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 VAL[VAIL]}
  \wordsense{n.（特指人在战场上的）勇气；勇猛}
  \wordexample{valorous（勇敢的，勇猛的）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[***]{valuable}{'væljuəbl}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 VAL[VAIL]}
  \wordsense{a. 贵重的；有价值的；有用的}
  \wordsense{n.（pl.）贵重物品}
  \wordexample{valuable friend（可贵的朋友） valuable discovery（有价值的发现）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[***]{valuation}{ˌvælju'eiʃn}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 VAL[VAIL]}
  \wordsense{n. 评价；估价；估定的价格}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[***]{value}{'vælju:}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 VAL[VAIL]}
  \wordsense{n. 价值；价格；有用性}
  \wordsense{v. 评价；尊重；重视}
  \wordexample{valueless（没有价值的）}
  \wordexample{valuer（（财产、土地等的）估价师；评价者）}
  \wordexample{value-added tax（增值税）}
\end{word}

\chapter{COR, CORD[COUR]}

\begin{itemize}
  \item 来自拉丁语的 cor, cord 意为 heart。变形为 cour。同义词根为来自希腊语的 card。
\end{itemize}

\begin{word}[***]{accord}{ə'kɔ:d}
  \wordbreakdown{心在近处 ac<ad (= to, near) + cord (= heart)}
  \wordsense{vi. with + sb 一致，调和}
  \wordsense{n. 一致，调和；协议，协定}
  \wordphrase{accordance 一致，调和}
  \wordphrase{accordant 一致的，和谐的}
  \wordexample{The union reached an accord with management at 4:30 this afternoon.（工会于今天下午 4 点 30 分和管理层达成了协议。）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[***]{concord}{'kɒŋkɔ:d}
  \wordbreakdown{心一致 con<com (= with) + cord (= heart)}
  \wordsense{n. 一致；和谐}
  \wordphrase{concordance 一致；和谐；用语索引 concordat 协定，协约 concordant 一致的；和谐的}
  \wordexample{The marital rift was short lasting, ending in concord.（婚姻生活的不和谐持续了一小段时间，但最终还是归于和睦。）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[***]{cordial}{'kɔ:diəl}
  \wordbreakdown{出自内心的 cord (= heart)}
  \wordsense{a. 衷心的，诚恳的}
  \wordsense{n. 甘露酒}
  \wordphrase{cordiality 热诚，诚挚}
  \wordphrase{cordially 热诚地，诚挚地}
  \wordexample{We received a cordial welcome when we arrived at my uncle's home.（当我们到叔叔家时，受到了热烈的欢迎。）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[**]{discordant}{dis'kɔ:dənt}
  \wordbreakdown{心分开的 dis (= apart) + cord (= heart)}
  \wordsense{a. 不和的；不一致的；（声音）不和谐的；刺耳的}
  \wordphrase{discordance / discordancy 不调和；不一致}
  \wordexample{discord 不一致；不和；（n.）不和；纷争}
  \wordexample{A number of discordant views were vigorously expressed at the meeting.（会上人们踊跃地提出了很多不同的意见。）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[***]{core}{kɔ:(r)}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 COR, CORD[COUR]}
  \wordsense{n. 核心；重要部分，中心部分；果核，果心}
  \wordsense{v. 挖去……的果核}
  \wordexample{Core English（核心英语） to the core（彻底） core an apple（挖出苹果的核）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[***]{courage}{'kʌridʒ}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 COR, CORD[COUR]}
  \wordsense{n. 勇气，胆量 *cour<cor (= heart)}
  \wordexample{Dutch courage（酒后之勇；一时的虚勇）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[***]{courageous}{kə'reidʒəs}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 COR, CORD[COUR]}
  \wordsense{a. 英勇的，勇敢的 *cour<cor (= heart)}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[***]{discourage}{dis'kʌridʒ}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 COR, CORD[COUR]}
  \wordsense{v. 使丧失勇气，使沮丧；使打消念头；阻碍 *dis (= away)}
  \wordexample{discouragement（阻碍；灰心）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[**]{encore}{'ɒŋkɔ:(r)}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 COR, CORD[COUR]}
  \wordsense{n. 请求再演}
  \wordsense{v. 要求再演（法国喊 “bis”） *en (= intensive)}
  \wordexample{get an encore（被要求再演） encore the pianist（要求那位钢琴演奏家再表演一曲） encore hours（（应观众要求的）重播时间）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[***]{encourage}{in'kʌridʒ}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 COR, CORD[COUR]}
  \wordsense{v. 激励，鼓舞；促进 *en (= make)}
  \wordexample{encouragement（激励，鼓励；促进）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[***]{record}{'rekɔ:d}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 COR, CORD[COUR]}
  \wordsense{n. 记录；履历；唱片；（比赛等的）最高纪录}
  \wordsense{v. [ri'kɔ:d] 记录；录音 *re (= again)}
  \wordexample{off the record（非正式的；不得发表的） good record（好的记录） record-breaking（打破纪录的）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[**]{recorder}{ri'kɔ:də(r)}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 COR, CORD[COUR]}
  \wordsense{n. 记录员；记录器，录音机，录像机}
  \wordexample{tape recorder（录音机） videotape recorder（磁带录像机）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[*]{recording}{ri'kɔ:diŋ}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 COR, CORD[COUR]}
  \wordsense{a. 记录的}
  \wordsense{n. 录音，录像 *re (= again)}
\end{word}

\chapter{APT[EPT, ATT]}

\begin{itemize}
  \item 来自拉丁语的 apt 意为 fit。变形为 ept 和 att。
\end{itemize}

\begin{word}[***]{adapt}{ə'dæpt}
  \wordbreakdown{使适合于某物 ad (= to) + apt (= fit)}
  \wordsense{v. oneself + to + sth 使适应，使合适；改编；改造}
  \wordsense{vi. to + sth 适应}
  \wordphrase{adaptation 适应，顺应；改编}
  \wordphrase{adaptability 适应性}
  \wordphrase{adaptable 可适应的；可改编的 adapted 合适的 adaptive 合适的，适应的}
  \wordexample{They say it takes 6 weeks to adapt to a new town after you move.（人们说搬家之后需要 6 周的时间来适应新城市的生活。）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[**]{adept}{ə'dept}
  \wordbreakdown{正好适合于某物的，合适的 ad (= to) + ept<apt (= fit)}
  \wordsense{a. 熟练的，娴熟的，精通的}
  \wordsense{n. 能手；内行}
  \wordexample{He's quite adept at archery, nearly always hitting the target dead on.（他很擅长射箭，几乎每次都能射中靶心。）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[**]{inept}{i'nept}
  \wordbreakdown{不适当的 in (= not) + ept<apt (= fit)}
  \wordsense{a. 不适当的；不熟练的；愚笨的；无能的}
  \wordphrase{ineptitude 不熟练，不适宜；不当的言行}
  \wordphrase{ineptly 不适当地}
  \wordexample{I apologize for my inept remark; I never meant to offend you.（我为自己不恰当的言语道歉，我绝不是有意冒犯您。）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[***]{apt}{æpt}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 APT[EPT, ATT]}
  \wordsense{a. 合适的，恰当的；聪明的；易于……的，有……倾向的}
  \wordexample{aptly（适当地；巧妙地）}
  \wordexample{aptness（适合性；倾向；才能）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[**]{aptitude}{'æptitju:d}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 APT[EPT, ATT]}
  \wordsense{n. 恰当，适宜；天资；倾向}
  \wordexample{aptitude test（能力倾向测验） Scholastic Aptitude Test（学习能力倾向测试，即 SAT，美国大学本科标准入学考试）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[***]{attitude}{'ætitju:d}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 APT[EPT, ATT]}
  \wordsense{n. 态度；姿势 *att<apt (= fit)}
  \wordexample{strike an attitude（装腔作势）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[*]{attitudinize}{ˌæti'tju:dinaiz}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 APT[EPT, ATT]}
  \wordsense{v. 装腔作势 *att<apt (= fit)}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[*]{contraption}{kən'træpʃn}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 APT[EPT, ATT]}
  \wordsense{n. 奇妙的装置；新发明物 *contr<contra (= against)}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[*]{periapt}{'periæpt}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 APT[EPT, ATT]}
  \wordsense{n. 护身符 *peri (= around)}
\end{word}

\chapter{LOT}

\begin{itemize}
  \item 来自盎格鲁-撒克逊语的 lot 意为 lot。同义词根有来自拉丁语的 sorc, sort 和来自希腊语的 cler。
\end{itemize}

\begin{word}[***]{allot}{ə'lɒt}
  \wordbreakdown{给某物分份 al<ad (= to) + lot (= lot)}
  \wordsense{vt. sth + to + sb 分摊，分配}
  \wordphrase{allotment 分摊，分配}
  \wordexample{The tour guide only allotted us 20 minutes to see the pyramids.（导游只留给我们 20 分钟的时间去参观金字塔。）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[***]{lot}{lɒt}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 LOT}
  \wordsense{n. 抽签；份儿；运气，命运；（拍卖的）物品；某一类人；（特定用处的）一块土地；《美》电影摄制场；大量}
  \wordexample{draw lots（抽签）}
  \wordexample{cast in one's lot with（与……生死与共） Lot 46, six chairs（物品 46，6 把椅子） bad lot（坏蛋） parking lot（停车场） building lot（建筑用地）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[**]{lottery}{'lɒtəri}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 LOT}
  \wordsense{n. 抽签，彩票；运气}
  \wordexample{lottery wheel（摇奖机） lottery ticket（彩票）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[*]{lotto}{'lɒtou}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 LOT}
  \wordsense{n. 一种对号码的赌博游戏}
\end{word}

\chapter{NE[NA, NO, N]}

\begin{itemize}
  \item 来自拉丁语的 ne 意为 not，表示否定。其变形有 na, no, n 等。
\end{itemize}

\begin{word}[**]{annul}{ə'nʌl}
  \wordbreakdown{使接近没有 an<ad (= to, near) + n<ne (= not) + ul (= any)}
  \wordsense{vt. 宣布……无效；废止，取消}
  \wordphrase{annulment 取消，废止}
  \wordexample{Failure to arrive to work on time will annul your employment contract.（如果你不能准时上班，将被解除聘用合同。）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[**]{nefarious}{ni'feəriəs}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 NE[NA, NO, N]}
  \wordsense{a. 恶毒的，邪恶的 *fa (= say)}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[*]{nescience}{'neʃəns}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 NE[NA, NO, N]}
  \wordsense{n. 无知 *sci (= know)}
  \wordexample{nescient（无知的）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[**]{neuter}{'nju:tə(r)}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 NE[NA, NO, N]}
  \wordsense{a. 中性的；（植物）无性的；生殖器发育不全的；不生育的}
  \wordsense{n.【语】中性名词；中性；生殖器发育不全的动物；阉割过的动物}
  \wordsense{v. 阉割 *uter (= whether of the two)}
  \wordexample{neutered tomcat（阉割过的雄猫）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[***]{neutral}{'nju:trəl}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 NE[NA, NO, N]}
  \wordsense{a. 中立的；中立国的；中性的；模糊的；略带灰色的；（齿轮）空档的}
  \wordsense{n. 中立者；中立国；（齿轮）空档 *utr<uter (= whether of the two)}
  \wordexample{neutral nations（中立国） neutral tints（暗淡色；灰色）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[**]{neutrality}{nju:'træləti}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 NE[NA, NO, N]}
  \wordsense{n. 中立状态 *utr<uter (= whether of the two)}
  \wordexample{armed neutrality（武装中立） strict neutrality（严格的中立）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[***]{neutralize}{'nju:trəlaiz}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 NE[NA, NO, N]}
  \wordsense{v. 使中立；使无效；使中和 *utr<uter (= whether of the two)}
  \wordexample{neutralize a poison（中和毒素）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[*]{neutron}{'nju:trɒn}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 NE[NA, NO, N]}
  \wordsense{n. 中子}
\end{word}

\begin{word}{naught***/nought***}{nɔ:t}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 NE[NA, NO, N]}
  \wordsense{n. 零；无 *ught (= thing), na, no<ne (= not)}
  \wordexample{come to nought / naught（归于失败） point nought / naught one（零点零一（0.01））}
\end{word}

\chapter{PAC, PEAS}

\begin{itemize}
  \item 来自拉丁语的 pac, peas 意为 peace。反义词根有意为 war 的来自拉丁语的 bell, mar 和来自法语的 guerr。
\end{itemize}

\begin{word}[***]{appease}{ə'pi:z}
  \wordbreakdown{给某人以和平、平静、和解 ap<ad (= to) + peas (= peace)}
  \wordsense{vt. 安慰，使镇定；满足；让步}
  \wordexample{appeasement 安慰；姑息；让步 cf. unappeasable 难以满足的；无法平息的}
  \wordexample{A cookie at 5:00 will appease hungry children before dinnertime.（晚饭之前孩子们会很饿，5 点钟的时候给他们一块饼干，可以哄住他们。）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[**]{pacify}{'pæsifai}
  \wordbreakdown{使变得平和 pac (= peace)}
  \wordsense{vt. 使平息；安抚；平定}
  \wordphrase{pacification 和解；平定}
  \wordexample{The teacher pacified the frightened children with soothing words.（老师用抚慰的话语使受惊吓的孩子平静。）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[***]{pacific}{pə'sifik}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 PAC, PEAS}
  \wordsense{a. 和平的；和解的；（大海等）平静的；温和的；太平的；太平洋的 *fic (= make)}
  \wordexample{pacific era（和平年代） the Pacific Ocean（太平洋） the Pacific States（（美国）太平洋沿岸的州（加利福尼亚州、俄勒冈州、华盛顿州等）） Pacific Standard Time（太平洋标准时间，比 East Standard Time（东部时间）晚 3 个小时）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[*]{pacification}{ˌpæsifi'keiʃn}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 PAC, PEAS}
  \wordsense{n. 和解；平定 *fic (= make)}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[*]{pacifism}{'pæsifizəm}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 PAC, PEAS}
  \wordsense{n. 和平主义}
  \wordexample{pacifist（和平主义者）}
\end{word}

\chapter{SERT}

\begin{itemize}
  \item 来自拉丁语的 sert 意为 to put, to place。同义词根有来自拉丁语的 loc, pos / post / pon / pound, stal 等，还有来自希腊语的 thes / thet / them, top。
\end{itemize}

\begin{word}[***]{assert}{ə'sɜ:t}
  \wordbreakdown{强烈地提出、表达自己的主张 as<ad (= to, intensive) + sert (= put)}
  \wordsense{v. 断言；主张}
  \wordphrase{assertion 断言；主张 assertiveness 自信}
  \wordphrase{assertive 断言的}
  \wordexample{We assert proudly that the Chinese people have been most generous.（我们可以自豪地断言，中国人民是非常慷慨的。）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[***]{desert}{di'zɜ:t}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 SERT}
  \wordsense{v. 逃跑；抛弃}
  \wordsense{n.（pl.）应得的赏罚；功过；['dezət] 沙漠；荒野}
  \wordsense{a. ['dezət] 不毛的；无人居住的 *de (= away)}
  \wordexample{deserter（逃亡者；逃兵）}
  \wordexample{according to one's deserts（根据某人的表现） the Sahara Desert（撒哈拉沙漠）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[***]{desertion}{di'zɜ:ʃn}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 SERT}
  \wordsense{n. 抛弃，遗弃；逃跑 *de (= away)}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[**]{dissertation}{ˌdisə'teiʃn}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 SERT}
  \wordsense{n. 论文 *dis (= apart, away)}
  \wordexample{Ph. D. dissertation（博士论文）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[***]{exert}{ig'zɜ:t}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 SERT}
  \wordsense{v. 发挥，运用；尽（力） *ex (= out), ert<sert (= put)}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[***]{exertion}{ig'zɜ:ʃn}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 SERT}
  \wordsense{n. 努力；发挥 *ex (= out), ert<sert (= put)}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[***]{insert}{in'sɜ:t}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 SERT}
  \wordsense{v. 插入，嵌入 *in (= into)}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[**]{insertion}{in'sɜ:ʃn}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 SERT}
  \wordsense{n. 插入，嵌入；插入物；（报纸等）插入的广告 *in (= into)}
\end{word}

\chapter{CED, CESS [CEED, CEAS]}

\begin{itemize}
  \item 来自拉丁语的 ced, cess 意为 to go。其变形为 ceed, ceas。同义词根有来自拉丁语的 grad / gress / gred, it, vad / vas，还有来自希腊语的 bat [bet, bit] 和来自盎格鲁-撒克逊语的 fare。
\end{itemize}

\begin{word}[***]{access}{'ækses}
  \wordbreakdown{走近 ac<ad (= to, near) + cess (= go)}
  \wordsense{n. 进入，接近；病的发作}
  \wordsense{vt.【计】存取；接近}
  \wordphrase{accessibility 可接近}
  \wordphrase{accessible 可接近的；易得到的}
  \wordexample{You can only access the building by one entrance on weekends.（周末只能通过一个入口进入那座建筑。）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[**]{accede}{ək'si:d}
  \wordbreakdown{走近 ac<ad (= to, near) + ced (= go)}
  \wordsense{vi. to + sth 同意；就任；继承；正式加入}
  \wordphrase{accession 继承；就任；接近；加盟}
  \wordexample{The police negotiator acceded to the kidnappers' demands.（警方谈判人员同意了绑架者的要求。）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[***]{concede}{kən'si:d}
  \wordbreakdown{带着某物走 con<com (= with) + ced (= go)}
  \wordsense{vt. 承认；让步；给予}
  \wordphrase{concessive 让步的，让与的}
  \wordexample{concession 让步，容忍；租地营业（权）；特许}
  \wordexample{As much as I hate losing an argument, I have to concede that you are correct.（我虽然很不喜欢在争论中输给别人，但我不得不承认你是对的。）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[**]{incessant}{in'sesnt}
  \wordbreakdown{不能走的 in (= not) + cess (= go)}
  \wordsense{a. 无休止的，不停的}
  \wordphrase{incessantly 不间断地}
  \wordexample{My ex-wife was an incessant complainer; my present wife isn't.（我的前妻常无休止地抱怨，而我现在的妻子不这样。）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[***]{precedent}{'presidənt}
  \wordbreakdown{向前走 pre (= before) + ced (= go)}
  \wordsense{n. 前例，先例；判例}
  \wordphrase{precede 领先；先于……}
  \wordphrase{precedence 领先，优先，居先}
  \wordphrase{preceding 在前的 precedented 有先例的}
  \wordexample{Some say the government's decision to continue logging sets a dangerous precedent.（有人说政府决定继续伐木开了一个危险的先例。）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[***]{predecessor}{'pri:disesə(r)}
  \wordbreakdown{领先往下走的人 pre (= before) + de (= down) + cess (= go)}
  \wordsense{n. 前任；祖先；被代替的原有事物}
  \wordexample{The new Miss America was crowned by her predecessor.（前任美国小姐给新当选的美国小姐戴上了王冠。）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[**]{recede}{ri'si:d}
  \wordbreakdown{向后走 re (= back) + ced (= go)}
  \wordsense{vi. 退，后退}
  \wordphrase{recession 退，后退 recess 假期；休会；休庭；幽深处}
  \wordexample{recessive 后退的，逆行的 recessional 后退的；《英》议会休会的；（n.）退场时唱的赞美诗}
  \wordexample{The flood waters are expected to recede within 36 hours.（预计暴涨的洪水将在 36 个小时内退去。）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[**]{intercede}{ˌintə'si:d}
  \wordbreakdown{走向其间 inter (= between) + ced (= go)}
  \wordsense{vi. in + sth; with + sb + for + sb 调停；仲裁；请愿，求情}
  \wordphrase{intercession 仲裁；调停；请求，请愿}
  \wordexample{We asked the consulate to intercede when our son was arrested in Panama.（儿子在巴拿马被捕时，我们请求领事馆予以调解。）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[***]{successive}{sək'sesiv}
  \wordbreakdown{连在底部、尾部走的 suc<sub (= under) + cess (= go)}
  \wordsense{a. 连续的；继承的}
  \wordexample{succession 连续；继承（权） successor 继承人；后继人}
  \wordexample{I was late to work on three successive days.（我连续三天上班迟到。）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[**]{abscess}{'æbses}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 CED, CESS [CEED, CEAS]}
  \wordsense{n. 脓肿，脓疮 *abs<ab (= away)}
  \wordexample{abscesses on the gums（齿龈脓肿）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[*]{accessary}{ək'sesəri}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 CED, CESS [CEED, CEAS]}
  \wordsense{n. 帮凶，从犯 *ac<ad (= near)}
  \wordexample{accessary to a crime（某犯罪行为的从犯）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[***]{accessory}{ək'sesəri}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 CED, CESS [CEED, CEAS]}
  \wordsense{n. 附属物；服饰搭配物（如钱包、手绢、胸针等）；从犯，帮凶}
  \wordsense{a. 附属的；帮凶的 *ac<ad (= near)}
  \wordexample{accessories of a bicycle（自行车的附件） accessories of a woman's dress（女装的搭配物）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[**]{antecedent}{'ænti'si:dənt}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 CED, CESS [CEED, CEAS]}
  \wordsense{a. 在先的，先前的}
  \wordsense{n. 前情；祖先；经历；先行词 *ante (= before)}
  \wordexample{antecedence（先行）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[***]{cease}{si:s}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 CED, CESS [CEED, CEAS]}
  \wordsense{v. 停止，终止 *ceas<cess (= go)}
  \wordexample{ceaseless（不断的）}
  \wordexample{ceasefire（停战） without cease（不停地）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[**]{cede}{si:d}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 CED, CESS [CEED, CEAS]}
  \wordsense{v. 转让（权力），割让（土地）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[**]{cessation}{se'seiʃn}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 CED, CESS [CEED, CEAS]}
  \wordsense{n. 停止；中止}
  \wordexample{cessation of hostilities（停战，停火）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[**]{cession}{'seʃn}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 CED, CESS [CEED, CEAS]}
  \wordsense{n.（权力的）转让，（土地的）割让，让与；转让的事物}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[***]{decease}{di'si:s}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 CED, CESS [CEED, CEAS]}
  \wordsense{n./v. 死亡，亡故 *de (= down)}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[***]{deceased}{di'si:st}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 CED, CESS [CEED, CEAS]}
  \wordsense{a. 已死的，已故的 *de (= down)}
  \wordexample{the deceased（死者） the deceased father（先父） family of the deceased（死者家属）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[*]{epicedium}{ˌepi'sidiəm}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 CED, CESS [CEED, CEAS]}
  \wordsense{n. 哀歌；挽歌 *epi (= upon)}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[***]{exceed}{ik'si:d}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 CED, CESS [CEED, CEAS]}
  \wordsense{v. 超越，超过，胜过 *ex (= out)}
  \wordexample{exceeding（非常的，极度的）}
  \wordexample{exceedingly（非常地，极度地）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[***]{excess}{ik'ses}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 CED, CESS [CEED, CEAS]}
  \wordsense{n. 过多，过剩；超过；过度，无节制；过分的行为；暴行}
  \wordsense{a. 过量的 *ex (= out)}
  \wordexample{excess of imports（入超） excess baggage / luggage（超重行李）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[***]{excessive}{ik'sesiv}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 CED, CESS [CEED, CEAS]}
  \wordsense{a. 过度的；过多的 *ex (= out)}
  \wordexample{excessively（过度地）}
  \wordexample{excessive charges（过高的收费）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[**]{inaccessible}{ˌinək'sesəbl}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 CED, CESS [CEED, CEAS]}
  \wordsense{a. 难以接近的 *in (= not), ac<ad (= near)}
  \wordexample{inaccessibility（不易接近，难达到）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[***]{necessarily}{ˌnesə'serəli}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 CED, CESS [CEED, CEAS]}
  \wordsense{ad. 必然地，必定地；必需地 *ne (= not)}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[***]{necessary}{'nesəsəri}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 CED, CESS [CEED, CEAS]}
  \wordsense{a. 必要的；必然的}
  \wordsense{n. 必需品}
  \wordexample{necessary evil（无法避免的坏事；不得已的事） necessary condition（必要条件）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[***]{necessitate}{nə'sesiteit}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 CED, CESS [CEED, CEAS]}
  \wordsense{v. 使成为必要；迫使 *ne (= not)}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[*]{necessitous}{nə'sesitəs}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 CED, CESS [CEED, CEAS]}
  \wordsense{a. 穷困的；贫乏的 *ne (= not)}
  \wordexample{in necessitous circumstances（在贫困的环境里）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[***]{necessity}{nə'sesəti}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 CED, CESS [CEED, CEAS]}
  \wordsense{n. 必要，必然性；必需品 *ne (= not)}
  \wordexample{daily necessities（生活必需品） Necessity knows no law.（情出无奈，罪可赦免。（做事不择手段的辩解语））}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[***]{procedure}{prə'si:dʒə(r)}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 CED, CESS [CEED, CEAS]}
  \wordsense{n. 程序，步骤，手续；（事态等的）进程 *pro (= forward)}
  \wordexample{legal procedure（法律程序） parliamentary procedure（议会议事程序） the code of civil / criminal procedure（民事 / 刑事诉讼法）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[**]{proceed}{prə'si:d}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 CED, CESS [CEED, CEAS]}
  \wordsense{v. 继续进行；出自，源于；起诉 *pro (= forward)}
  \wordexample{diseases that proceed from dirt（因不干净而引发的疾病）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[***]{proceeding}{prə'si:diŋ}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 CED, CESS [CEED, CEAS]}
  \wordsense{n. 进行；（pl.）行为；诉讼（程序）；会议录 *pro (= forward)}
  \wordexample{take / start legal proceedings against（对……起诉） the proceedings of the Kent Archaeological Society（肯特考古学会的会议录）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[*]{proceeds}{'prəusidz}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 CED, CESS [CEED, CEAS]}
  \wordsense{n. 收入，收益 *pro (= forward, forth)}
  \wordexample{net proceeds（纯收入） proceeds of business（营业收入）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[***]{process}{'prəuses}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 CED, CESS [CEED, CEAS]}
  \wordsense{v.（为保存原材料而进行）处理，加工（食品）；【摄】洗（胶卷）；【计】处理数据}
  \wordsense{n. 进程，过程；工序，步骤；制作方法；【印】照相制版术；【律】诉讼；传票，诉讼过程中的各种命令}
  \wordexample{processed cheese / butter（加工过的奶酪 / 黄油） process film（冲洗胶片） new process of dyeing（新式染色法） three-color process（三色印刷法）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[***]{procession}{prə'seʃn}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 CED, CESS [CEED, CEAS]}
  \wordsense{n.（人、车等的）行列；行进 *pro (= forward)}
  \wordexample{in procession（列队）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[*]{processional}{prə'seʃənl}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 CED, CESS [CEED, CEAS]}
  \wordsense{a. 行列的；列队时用的 *pro (= forward)}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[**]{secede}{si'si:d}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 CED, CESS [CEED, CEAS]}
  \wordsense{v.（从政党、教会组织等中）退出，脱离 *se (= away, apart)}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[**]{secession}{si'seʃn}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 CED, CESS [CEED, CEAS]}
  \wordsense{n. 退出，脱离（组织、政党等）；【美史】（引发南北战争的）南部十一州脱离联邦 *se (= away, apart)}
  \wordexample{secessionist（分离论者；脱离派者；【美史】（S\textasciitilde{}）南北战争中主张脱离联邦者）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[***]{succeed}{sək'si:d}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 CED, CESS [CEED, CEAS]}
  \wordsense{v. 成功；继承 *suc<sub (= under)}
  \wordexample{succeed to an estate（继承财产）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[***]{success}{sək'ses}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 CED, CESS [CEED, CEAS]}
  \wordsense{n. 成功；兴旺；成功的人（或事） *suc<sub (= under)}
  \wordexample{success story（成功故事） Nothing succeeds like success.（一事成，事事成。）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[***]{successful}{sək'sesfl}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 CED, CESS [CEED, CEAS]}
  \wordsense{a. 成功的；一帆风顺的；有成就的 *suc<sub (= under)}
  \wordexample{successfully（成功地，圆满地）}
  \wordexample{successful bid（中标） successful candidate（当选者） successful business（兴隆的生意）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[**]{unprecedented}{ʌn'presidəntid}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 CED, CESS [CEED, CEAS]}
  \wordsense{a. 无先例的 *un (= not), pre (= before)}
  \wordexample{precedented（有先例的）}
\end{word}

\chapter{PLIC, PLY, PLI, PLE, PLEX, PLO}

\begin{itemize}
  \item 来自拉丁语的 plic, ply, pli, ple, plex, plo 意为 to fold。意为 to fill, full 的词根 ple, plet, pli, ply, plen 等和这些词根形态相似，易于混淆，需要注意。
\end{itemize}

\begin{word}[***]{accomplice}{ə'kʌmplis}
  \wordbreakdown{一起折得很近 ac<ad (= near) + com (= together) + plic (= fold)}
  \wordsense{n. 共犯，同谋者}
  \wordexample{The jewel thief was arrested with two younger accomplices.（那个偷宝石的小偷和两个年龄更小的共犯一起被逮捕了。）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[**]{applicable}{ə'plikəbl}
  \wordbreakdown{折得很近的 ap<ad (= to, near) + plic (= fold)}
  \wordsense{a. 可应用的；适当的}
  \wordphrase{applicant 申请者}
  \wordphrase{applied 适用的；应用的}
  \wordphrase{apply 适用；应用；申请}
  \wordexample{application 适用；应用；申请（书）；敷用药 applicability 适用性；应用性}
  \wordexample{It's necessary to obey all applicable construction laws when you build a house.（盖房子时需要遵守所有适用的建筑法。）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[**]{explicit}{ik'splisit}
  \wordbreakdown{折叠后放在外边的 ex (= out) + plic (= fold)}
  \wordsense{a. 清楚的，明白的，明确的；直率的}
  \wordphrase{explicate 阐明}
  \wordphrase{explication 阐明}
  \wordphrase{explicable 可说明的}
  \wordphrase{explicitly 明白地}
  \wordexample{Her boss gave her an explicit warning not to come late again upon penalty of termination.（她的老板明确地警告她，如果再迟到，就要以解雇来惩罚她。）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[***]{imply}{im'plai}
  \wordbreakdown{折向里面 im<in (= in) + ply (= fold)}
  \wordsense{vt. 意味着；暗示；包含}
  \wordphrase{implication 牵连；暗示；蕴含}
  \wordphrase{implicit 暗示的；含蓄的}
  \wordphrase{implicitly 含蓄地；暗示地 implicate 牵连}
  \wordexample{I didn't mean to imply that he's rude, just that he's often busy.（我的意思不是说他很无礼，只是说他总是很忙。）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[**]{replica}{'replikə}
  \wordbreakdown{重新折到那个程度的东西 re (= again) + plic (= fold)}
  \wordsense{n.（尤指出于原作者之手的）复制品}
  \wordexample{Our school team won the prize for the best replica of the Hoover Dam.（我们学校参赛组制作的胡佛水坝模型最好，所以拿了奖。）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[**]{supplicate}{'sʌplikeit}
  \wordbreakdown{向下折叠 sup<sub (= under) + plic (= fold)}
  \wordsense{vt. 恳求，哀求}
  \wordphrase{supplication 恳求，哀求 suppliant 恳求者，哀求者}
  \wordexample{The immigrant supplicated the border guard to please let him pass.（那个移民者恳求国境警卫让自己通过。）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[**]{pliable}{'plaiəbl}
  \wordbreakdown{易折的 pli (= fold)}
  \wordsense{a. 易弯的；易受影响的；顺从的；易适应的}
  \wordexample{pliability / pliancy 柔软性；适应性 cf. pliant (= pliable)}
  \wordexample{The wood is actually pliable because it's so thin.（这木头很薄，所以实际上很易于弯曲。）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[**]{complicate}{'kɒmplikeit}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 PLIC, PLY, PLI, PLE, PLEX, PLO}
  \wordsense{v. 使变复杂，使难对付 *com (= together)}
  \wordexample{This complicates matters.（这使事情变得复杂。）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[***]{complicated}{'kɒmplikeitid}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 PLIC, PLY, PLI, PLE, PLEX, PLO}
  \wordsense{a. 复杂的 *com (= together)}
  \wordexample{complicated machine（复杂的机器）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[***]{complication}{ˌkɒmpli'keiʃn}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 PLIC, PLY, PLI, PLE, PLEX, PLO}
  \wordsense{n. 复杂；混乱；并发症 *com (= together)}
  \wordexample{influenza with complications（带有并发症的流行性感冒）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[*]{complicity}{kəm'plisəti}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 PLIC, PLY, PLI, PLE, PLEX, PLO}
  \wordsense{n. 共谋，串通 *com (= together)}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[***]{duplicate}{'dju:plikeit}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 PLIC, PLY, PLI, PLE, PLEX, PLO}
  \wordsense{v. 复写；拷贝；复制；使加倍}
  \wordsense{a. 两重的；一对的；两倍的；完全相同的；复制的}
  \wordsense{n. 完全一样的东西；复制品；副本}
  \wordexample{duplicate keys（复制的钥匙） duplicate copies（副本） duplicating paper（复写纸）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[*]{duplication}{ˌdju:pli'keiʃn}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 PLIC, PLY, PLI, PLE, PLEX, PLO}
  \wordsense{n. 复写；复制；复制品 *du (= two)}
  \wordexample{duplicator（复印机）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[**]{duplicity}{dju:'plisəti}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 PLIC, PLY, PLI, PLE, PLEX, PLO}
  \wordsense{n.（有意的）欺骗，欺诈 *du (= two)}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[**]{inexplicable}{ˌinik'splikəbl}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 PLIC, PLY, PLI, PLE, PLEX, PLO}
  \wordsense{a. 无法说明的；难以理解的 *in (= not), ex (= out)}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[***]{multiply}{'mʌltiplai}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 PLIC, PLY, PLI, PLE, PLEX, PLO}
  \wordsense{v. 增加；繁殖；乘 *multi (= many)}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[**]{multiplication}{ˌmʌltipli'keiʃn}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 PLIC, PLY, PLI, PLE, PLEX, PLO}
  \wordsense{n. 增加；繁殖；乘法（↔ division 除法） *multi (= many)}
  \wordexample{multiplication sign（乘号（×）） multiplication table（乘法表）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[***]{multiplicity}{ˌmʌlti'plisəti}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 PLIC, PLY, PLI, PLE, PLEX, PLO}
  \wordsense{n. 多；多样（性） *multi (= many)}
  \wordexample{the multiplicity of small city states（小城邦的多样性）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[*]{quadruplicate}{kwɒ'dru:plikeit}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 PLIC, PLY, PLI, PLE, PLEX, PLO}
  \wordsense{v. 把……制成一式四份}
  \wordsense{a. 一式四份的}
  \wordsense{n. 一式四份中的一份 *quadru (= four)}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[***]{reply}{ri'plai}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 PLIC, PLY, PLI, PLE, PLEX, PLO}
  \wordsense{v./n. 回答，回应 *re (= back, again)}
  \wordexample{reply letter（回信）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[*]{replication}{ˌrepli'keiʃn}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 PLIC, PLY, PLI, PLE, PLEX, PLO}
  \wordsense{n. 应答；复制 *re (= back, again)}
  \wordexample{replicate（复制）}
  \wordexample{replication of DNA（DNA 复制）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[***]{simplicity}{sim'plisəti}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 PLIC, PLY, PLI, PLE, PLEX, PLO}
  \wordsense{n. 单纯；简朴；简单，简易 *sim (= one)}
  \wordexample{simplicity of life（生活的简朴） simplicity of the problem（问题的简单）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[*]{triplicate}{'triplikit}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 PLIC, PLY, PLI, PLE, PLEX, PLO}
  \wordsense{v. 把……制成一式三份}
  \wordsense{a. 一式三份的}
  \wordsense{n. 一式三份中的一份 *tri (= three)}
  \wordexample{triplicate certificate（一式三份的证书） document drawn up in triplicate（制成一式三份的文件）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[***]{appliance}{ə'plaiəns}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 PLIC, PLY, PLI, PLE, PLEX, PLO}
  \wordsense{n. 器具；装置 *ap<ad (= to)}
  \wordexample{household / home appliances（家用器具） office appliances（办公用品）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[**]{suppliant}{'sʌplaiənt}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 PLIC, PLY, PLI, PLE, PLEX, PLO}
  \wordsense{a. 恳求的，哀求的}
  \wordsense{n. 恳求者，哀求者 *sup<sub (= under)}
  \wordexample{in a suppliant attitude（以恳求的态度）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[**]{multiple}{'mʌltipl}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 PLIC, PLY, PLI, PLE, PLEX, PLO}
  \wordsense{a. 复合的；多样的}
  \wordsense{n. 倍数 *multi (= many)}
  \wordexample{multiple choice（多项选择） multiple cropping（【农】复种，多熟种植） multiple warheads（多弹头） least / lowest common multiple（缩写为 LCM，最小公倍数）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[*]{pleach}{pli:tʃ}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 PLIC, PLY, PLI, PLE, PLEX, PLO}
  \wordsense{v. 编结（藤条或树枝）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[**]{pleat}{pli:t}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 PLIC, PLY, PLI, PLE, PLEX, PLO}
  \wordsense{n. 褶皱}
  \wordsense{v. 打褶}
  \wordexample{pleated skirt（百褶裙）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[**]{quadruple}{'kwɒdru:pl}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 PLIC, PLY, PLI, PLE, PLEX, PLO}
  \wordsense{a. 四部分组成的；四方的；四倍的}
  \wordsense{n. 四倍}
  \wordsense{v.（使）成四倍}
  \wordexample{quadruple alliance（四方同盟） quadruple his income（将他的收入增长到原来的四倍）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[***]{triple}{'tripl}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 PLIC, PLY, PLI, PLE, PLEX, PLO}
  \wordsense{a. 三部分组成的；三方的；三倍的}
  \wordsense{v.（使）成三倍 *tri (= three)}
  \wordexample{Triple Alliance（三国同盟） Triple Entente（三国协议） Triple Intervention（三国介入） triple time（三拍子）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[***]{complex}{'kɒmpleks}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 PLIC, PLY, PLI, PLE, PLEX, PLO}
  \wordsense{a. 复杂的；复合的}
  \wordsense{n. 综合体，（相关事物组成的）复合物；【心】情结 *com (= together)}
  \wordexample{apartment complex（综合公寓区） Watergate Complex（水门综合大厦） inferiority / superiority complex（自卑情结 / 优越感）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[***]{complexion}{kəm'plekʃn}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 PLIC, PLY, PLI, PLE, PLEX, PLO}
  \wordsense{n. 肤色，气色；情况 *com (= together)}
  \wordexample{fair complexion（白皮肤） fair-complexion（皮肤白皙的） dark-complexion（皮肤黑的） the complexion of the war（战况）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[**]{complexity}{kəm'pleksəti}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 PLIC, PLY, PLI, PLE, PLEX, PLO}
  \wordsense{n. 复杂性；复杂的事物 *com (= together)}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[*]{duplex}{'dju:pleks}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 PLIC, PLY, PLI, PLE, PLEX, PLO}
  \wordsense{a. 双重的；双倍的 *du (= two)}
  \wordexample{duplex apartment（复式公寓（有上下两层，楼层间由楼梯相连））}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[*]{multiplex}{'mʌltipleks}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 PLIC, PLY, PLI, PLE, PLEX, PLO}
  \wordsense{a. 许多的；多样的 *multi (= many)}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[***]{perplex}{pə'pleks}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 PLIC, PLY, PLI, PLE, PLEX, PLO}
  \wordsense{v. 使困惑，使不知所措；使复杂化 *per (= thoroughly)}
  \wordexample{perplexed（困惑的，不知所措的；复杂的）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[***]{perplexity}{pə'pleksəti}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 PLIC, PLY, PLI, PLE, PLEX, PLO}
  \wordsense{n. 困惑茫然；混乱的状态 *per (= thoroughly)}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[*]{triplex}{'tripleks}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 PLIC, PLY, PLI, PLE, PLEX, PLO}
  \wordsense{a. 三层的，三倍的，三重的 *tri (= three)}
  \wordexample{triplex glass（三层玻璃）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[*]{deploy}{di'plɔi}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 PLIC, PLY, PLI, PLE, PLEX, PLO}
  \wordsense{v.【军】展开；部署 *de (= down)}
  \wordexample{deployment（展开）}
  \wordexample{deploy argument（展开辩论）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[***]{diploma}{di'pləumə}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 PLIC, PLY, PLI, PLE, PLEX, PLO}
  \wordsense{n. 毕业文凭；学位证书 *di (= double, two)}
  \wordexample{diploma in political science（政治学学位证书）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[***]{diplomacy}{di'pləuməsi}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 PLIC, PLY, PLI, PLE, PLEX, PLO}
  \wordsense{n. 外交；外交手腕；交际手段 *di (= double, two)}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[***]{diplomat}{'dipləmæt}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 PLIC, PLY, PLI, PLE, PLEX, PLO}
  \wordsense{n. 外交官；外交家 *di (= double, two)}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[***]{diplomatic}{ˌdiplə'mætik}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 PLIC, PLY, PLI, PLE, PLEX, PLO}
  \wordsense{a. 外交的；有外交手腕的；老练的 *di (= double, two)}
  \wordexample{diplomatic break（外交关系中断） diplomatic corps / body（外交使团） diplomatic immunity（外交豁免） be diplomatic in dealing with people（在处理人际关系上很老练的）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[***]{exploit}{'eksplɔit}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 PLIC, PLY, PLI, PLE, PLEX, PLO}
  \wordsense{n. 英勇的行为；业绩，功勋}
  \wordsense{v. 利用；开拓，开发；剥削 *ex (= out)}
  \wordexample{exploitation（开发，开拓；剥削）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[***]{employ}{im'plɔi}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 PLIC, PLY, PLI, PLE, PLEX, PLO}
  \wordsense{v. 雇用；使用，利用 *em<en (= in)}
  \wordexample{employable（可使用的）}
  \wordexample{employer（雇主） employee（雇员）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[***]{employment}{im'plɔimənt}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 PLIC, PLY, PLI, PLE, PLEX, PLO}
  \wordsense{n. 使用；雇用；职业 *em<en (= in)}
  \wordexample{full employment（充分就业） employment agency（职业介绍所） seek employment（求职） in the employment of（受雇于） out of employment（失业）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[***]{unemployment}{ˌʌnim'plɔimənt}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 PLIC, PLY, PLI, PLE, PLEX, PLO}
  \wordsense{n. 失业；失业状态 *un (= not), em<en (= in)}
  \wordexample{unemployment benefit / pay（失业救济金） unemployment insurance（失业保险） unemployment rate（失业率）}
\end{word}

\chapter{JOURN}

\begin{itemize}
  \item 词根 journ 来自于拉丁语，意为 day。同义词根为 hemer.
\end{itemize}

\begin{word}[***]{adjourn}{ə'dʒə:n}
  \wordbreakdown{改到近日 ad (= to, near) + journ (= day)}
  \wordsense{vt. 使（会议等）延期；休（会）；中止}
  \wordsense{vi. to + sth 换地方；休会}
  \wordphrase{adjournment 延期；休会}
  \wordexample{The jury adjourned their deliberations for lunch at 12:30.（12 点 30 分陪审团暂时中止审议，去用午餐。）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[***]{journal}{'dʒə:nl}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 JOURN}
  \wordsense{n. 日报；杂志；期刊；日志；日记}
  \wordexample{Wall Street Journal（《华尔街日报》） Ladies' Home Journal（《妇女家庭杂志》） Economic Journal（《经济学杂志》） American Journal of Political Science（《美国政治学期刊》） process journal（进度日志）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[***]{journalism}{'dʒə:nəlizəm}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 JOURN}
  \wordsense{n. 新闻业；新闻工作（包括写作、编辑、出版等）；【总称】报章杂志}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[***]{journalist}{'dʒə:nəlist}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 JOURN}
  \wordsense{n. 新闻工作者；新闻记者；报纸撰稿人}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[**]{journalistic}{ˌdʒə:nə'listik}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 JOURN}
  \wordsense{a. 新闻业的；报刊特有的；新闻工作（者）的}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[***]{journey}{'dʒə:ni}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 JOURN}
  \wordsense{n. 旅行（多指陆上的长途旅行）；旅程}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[**]{journeyman}{'dʒə:nimən}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 JOURN}
  \wordsense{n.（旧时）学徒期满的工匠；熟练工；雇工}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[*]{sojourn}{'sɒdʒə:n}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 JOURN}
  \wordsense{n./v. 逗留；旅居 *so<sub (= under)}
\end{word}

\chapter{VEN, VENT}

\begin{itemize}
  \item 来自拉丁语的 ven, vent 意为 to come。
\end{itemize}

\begin{word}[***]{advent}{'ædvent}
  \wordbreakdown{靠近 ad (= to, near) + vent (= come)}
  \wordsense{n. 到来；出现；（A\textasciitilde{}）基督降临}
  \wordexample{The politician promised that his inauguration was the advent of a new era.（那位政治家承诺，他的就任将是一个新时代的到来。）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[**]{adventitious}{ˌædven'tiʃəs}
  \wordbreakdown{过来靠近的 ad (= to, near) + vent (= come)}
  \wordsense{a. 偶然的；外来的}
  \wordexample{It's difficult to know if certain personality traits are adventitious or genetically predetermined.（人们很难得知某种性格特征是偶然形成的还是遗传所决定的。）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[**]{convene}{kən'vi:n}
  \wordbreakdown{一起来 con<com (= together) + ven (= come)}
  \wordsense{vt. 召集；传唤}
  \wordsense{vi. 聚集，集会}
  \wordphrase{convention 会议，大会；惯例}
  \wordphrase{conventional 会议的；惯例的；传统的，因袭的；常见的}
  \wordexample{The chairman convened a city council meeting to decide on the controversy.（为了对这一争论作出决断，议长召集了市议会。）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[***]{covenant}{'kʌvənənt}
  \wordbreakdown{一起来 co<com (= together) + ven (= come)}
  \wordsense{n.（有法律约束力的）契约；盟约}
  \wordexample{On July 4th, 1776, fifty-six men meeting at Philadelphia made an historic covenant.（1776 年 7 月 4 日，56 人会集在费城，签订了历史性的盟约。）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[***]{intervene}{ˌintə'vi:n}
  \wordbreakdown{来到其间 inter (= between) + ven (= come)}
  \wordsense{vi. in + sth 介入；干预，干涉；仲裁}
  \wordphrase{intervention 调停，仲裁；干涉，介入}
  \wordexample{I try not to intervene in the disputes among my children.（我尽量不介入孩子之间的争吵。）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[*]{supervene}{ˌsu:pə'vi:n}
  \wordbreakdown{从上往下来 super (= over) + ven (= come)}
  \wordsense{v. 意外发生；伴随发生}
  \wordexample{Paul Enders was dying of AIDS, so his fatal automobile accident only supervened the virus' attenuations of his life.（因患有艾滋病，保罗·恩德斯已生命垂危，那场致命的车祸只不过是在艾滋病毒侵蚀他身体后接着发生而已。）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[***]{adventure}{əd'ventʃə(r)}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 VEN, VENT}
  \wordsense{n. 冒险（经历）；投机活动；女冒险者}
  \wordsense{v. 冒险 *ad (= to)}
  \wordexample{adventurer（冒险家；投机者） adventuress（女投机者（指用不正当手段谋求名利的女子））}
  \wordexample{story of adventure（冒险故事）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[***]{adventurous}{əd'ventʃərəs}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 VEN, VENT}
  \wordsense{a. 冒险的；喜欢冒险的；大胆的；充满危险和刺激的 *ad (= to)}
  \wordexample{adventurous voyage（惊险的航海）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[***]{avenue}{'ævənju:}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 VEN, VENT}
  \wordsense{n. 大街，大道（avenue 为南北走向，street 为东西走向）；《喻》途径 *a<ad (= to)}
  \wordexample{avenues to success（通往成功之路）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[**]{circumvent}{ˌsə:kəm'vent}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 VEN, VENT}
  \wordsense{v. 规避（法律、规则、困难等）；防止发生 *circum (= around)}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[***]{convenient}{kən'vi:njənt}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 VEN, VENT}
  \wordsense{a. 便利的，方便的；适宜的 *con<com (= together)}
  \wordexample{conveniently（便利地）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[***]{convenience}{kən'vi:niəns}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 VEN, VENT}
  \wordsense{n. 便利，方便；方便的用具（或设备）；实利，好处 *con<com (= together)}
  \wordexample{as a matter of convenience（为方便起见） at your earliest convenience（在你方便时尽早） marriage of convenience（基于利害关系的婚姻，权宜婚姻） all modern conveniences（所有现代化设施）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[***]{convent}{'kɒnvənt}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 VEN, VENT}
  \wordsense{n. 女修道会；女修道院；女隐修会 *con<com (= together)}
  \wordexample{convent school（女隐修会学校） go into / enter a convent（当修女）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[*]{contravene}{ˌkɒntrə'vi:n}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 VEN, VENT}
  \wordsense{v. 违反（法律、习惯等）；反驳（陈述、主张等）；与……相抵触，不一致 *contra (= against, opposite)}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[*]{contravention}{ˌkɒntrə'venʃn}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 VEN, VENT}
  \wordsense{n.（法律等的）违反，违背 *contra (= against, opposite)}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[***]{event}{i'vent}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 VEN, VENT}
  \wordsense{n.（重要）事件；后果，结果；情况；（体育运动的）比赛项目 *e<ex (= out)}
  \wordexample{Coming events cast their shadows before.（山雨欲来风满楼。）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[**]{eventual}{i'ventʃuəl}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 VEN, VENT}
  \wordsense{a. 最终的；结果的 *e<ex (= out)}
  \wordexample{eventually（最后，终于）}
  \wordexample{eventuality（可能发生的事；可能性）}
  \wordexample{his foolish behavior and eventual failure（他愚蠢的行为及最终的失败）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[*]{eventful}{i'ventfl}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 VEN, VENT}
  \wordsense{a. 变故多的}
  \wordexample{He has had an eventful life.（他的一生中有很多大事。） The past year has been eventful.（去年是多事的一年。）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[***]{invent}{in'vent}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 VEN, VENT}
  \wordsense{v. 发明，创造；捏造（谎言等），虚构 *in (= on)}
  \wordexample{inventor（发明者，发明家；创造者）}
  \wordexample{invent an excuse for being late（编造迟到的借口）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[***]{invention}{in'venʃn}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 VEN, VENT}
  \wordsense{n. 发明；创造；发明物；编造的故事；虚构；捏造 *in (= on)}
  \wordexample{numerous inventions of Edison（爱迪生的众多发明） newspapers that are full of inventions（充斥着虚假报道的报纸）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[**]{inventive}{in'ventiv}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 VEN, VENT}
  \wordsense{a. 有发明才能的；善于创造的，有创造力的 *in (= on)}
  \wordexample{inventive mind（富有创意的头脑） inventive powers（发明创造的能力）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[**]{inventory}{'invəntri}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 VEN, VENT}
  \wordsense{n. 详细目录；（财产）目录；存货（总价）；存货盘存（报表）}
  \wordsense{v. 编制目录；盘存 *in (= on)}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[*]{parvenu}{'pa:vənju:}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 VEN, VENT}
  \wordsense{n. 新贵；暴发户 *par<per (= completely)}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[***]{prevent}{pri'vent}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 VEN, VENT}
  \wordsense{v. 阻止，阻碍；预防 *pre (= before)}
  \wordexample{preventable（可阻止的；可预防的）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[***]{prevention}{pri'venʃn}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 VEN, VENT}
  \wordsense{n. 防止，阻碍；预防 *pre (= before)}
  \wordexample{Prevention is better than cure.（预防胜于治疗。） prevention of cruelty to animals（防止虐待动物）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[**]{preventive}{pri'ventiv}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 VEN, VENT}
  \wordsense{a. 阻止的；预防的 *pre (= before)}
  \wordexample{preventative（预防药）}
  \wordexample{preventive medicine / measures（预防药 / 预防措施） preventive detention / custody（【律】预防性拘留） preventive officer（《英》缉私官）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[*]{provenance}{'prɒvənəns}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 VEN, VENT}
  \wordsense{n. 起源，出处；（艺术品、手稿等的）历史，由来和发展 *pro (= forth)}
  \wordexample{antique furniture of doubtful provenance（来历可疑的古旧家具（如不知是不是古董））}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[***]{revenue}{'revənju:}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 VEN, VENT}
  \wordsense{n. 收入；（国家的）岁入，税收；（pl.）总收入 *re (= again, back)}
  \wordexample{revenue and expenditure（收支） defraud the revenue（逃税） Internal Revenue Service（美国国内收入署（简称：IRS）） revenue cutter（（海关的）缉私船） revenue officer（税收人员） revenue sharing（《美》（联邦政府分配给各州的）岁入分配） revenue stamp（印花税票）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[**]{souvenir}{ˌsu:və'niə(r)}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 VEN, VENT}
  \wordsense{n. 纪念品 *sou<sub (= in place of)}
  \wordexample{souvenir sheet（（集邮用语）小型张）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[**]{venue}{'venju:}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 VEN, VENT}
  \wordsense{n.（比赛、会议等的）地点；审判地（召集审判员进行审判的地点）}
  \wordexample{Seoul was the venue of the 1988 Olympic Games.（首尔是 1988 年奥运会的主办地。）}
  \wordexample{change the venue（（为保证审判的公平而）更换审判地）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[***]{venture}{'ventʃə(r)}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 VEN, VENT}
  \wordsense{v. 冒险；斗胆提出（或说出）}
  \wordsense{n. 投机；（冒险）事业}
  \wordexample{venturesome（（人）爱冒险的，大胆的；（活动、行为）危险的）}
  \wordexample{Nothing venture, nothing have / gain / win.（不入虎穴，焉得虎子。） venture capital（冒险投入资本，风险资本）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[**]{ventilate}{'ventileit}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 VEN, VENT}
  \wordsense{v.（给房间等）通风，换气；引起讨论}
  \wordexample{ventilator（换气 / 通风装置）}
  \wordexample{ventilate a room（给房间通风） The matter should be freely ventilated.（这个问题需要进行自由讨论。）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[**]{ventilation}{ˌventi'leiʃn}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 VEN, VENT}
  \wordsense{n. 通风，换气}
  \wordexample{the ventilation shaft of a coal mine（煤矿的通风井）}
\end{word}

\chapter{GRAV [GRIEV]}

\begin{itemize}
  \item 来自拉丁语的 grav 意为 heavy。其变形为 griev。
\end{itemize}

\begin{word}[**]{aggravate}{'ægrəveit}
  \wordbreakdown{使更沉重 ag<ad (= to, add) + grav (= heavy)}
  \wordsense{vt. 使恶化；使恼火}
  \wordphrase{aggravation 恶化；恼火}
  \wordphrase{aggravating 恶化的}
  \wordexample{Cold weather always seems to aggravate my arthritis pain.（好像冷天总会使我的关节炎疼痛加重。）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[**]{aggrieve}{ə'gri:v}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 GRAV [GRIEV]}
  \wordsense{v.【常用被动语态】使委屈；使悲痛 *ag<ad (= add), griev<grav (= heavy)}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[***]{grave}{greiv}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 GRAV [GRIEV]}
  \wordsense{n. 墓穴，坟墓}
  \wordexample{gravedigger（掘墓人） gravestone（墓碑，墓石） graveyard（墓地）}
  \wordexample{have one foot in the grave（离死期不远）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[*]{gravitate}{'græviteit}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 GRAV [GRIEV]}
  \wordsense{v. 受引力作用而运动；受吸引}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[***]{gravitation}{ˌgrævi'teiʃn}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 GRAV [GRIEV]}
  \wordsense{n. 引力；重力}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[***]{gravity}{'grævəti}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 GRAV [GRIEV]}
  \wordsense{n. 引力；重力；重量；严重性}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[***]{grievance}{'gri:vəns}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 GRAV [GRIEV]}
  \wordsense{n. 不满，不平；牢骚，抱怨 *griev<grav (= heavy)}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[***]{grieve}{gri:v}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 GRAV [GRIEV]}
  \wordsense{v. 使悲痛 *griev<grav (= heavy)}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[***]{grievous}{'gri:vəs}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 GRAV [GRIEV]}
  \wordsense{a.（令人）悲痛的；严重的 *griev<grav (= heavy)}
  \wordexample{grievous railway accident（悲惨的铁路事故） grievous mistake（大错） grievous pain（极度的痛苦）}
\end{word}

\chapter{NEX, NECT}

\begin{itemize}
  \item 来自拉丁语的 nex, nect 意为 to bind。同义词根有来自拉丁语的 cinct, lig, string / strict / strain / stress 等和来自希腊语的 bond，此外还有意为 to join 的 junct / jug / join，含义相似。
\end{itemize}

\begin{word}[**]{annexation}{ˌænek'seiʃn}
  \wordbreakdown{绑得很近 an<ad (= to, near) + nex (= bind)}
  \wordsense{n. 合并；被合并的领土；附加（物）}
  \wordexample{annex 合并；附加；（n.）附加物；增建的房屋}
  \wordexample{The annexation of Rapa Nui Island by Chile occurred in 1888.（智利吞并复活节岛一事发生在 1888 年。）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[***]{connect}{kə'nekt}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 NEX, NECT}
  \wordsense{v. 连接；联想；联系；使联姻 *con<com (= with)}
  \wordexample{well-connected（与权贵有关系的）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[***]{connection}{kə'nekʃn}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 NEX, NECT}
  \wordsense{n. 连接；衔接；（人与人之间的）关系；客户 *con<com (= with)}
  \wordexample{form useful connections（形成有利的关系） have connections with（与……有关系）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[**]{connective}{kə'nektiv}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 NEX, NECT}
  \wordsense{a. 连接的}
  \wordsense{n.【语】关联词 *con<com (= with)}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[**]{disconnect}{ˌdiskə'nekt}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 NEX, NECT}
  \wordsense{v. 使分离；断开 *dis (= away), con<com (= with)}
  \wordexample{disconnected（（语言、文字等）不连贯的）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[***]{nexus}{'neksəs}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 NEX, NECT}
  \wordsense{n. 关联，关系；【语】动词谓语结构}
\end{word}

\chapter{NIHIL}

\begin{itemize}
  \item 来自拉丁语的 nihil 意为 nothing。
\end{itemize}

\begin{word}[*]{annihilate}{ə'naiəleit}
  \wordbreakdown{使接近没有 an<ad (= near) + nihil (= nothing)}
  \wordsense{vt. 歼灭；彻底击溃；取消，废弃，使无效}
  \wordphrase{annihilation 歼灭}
  \wordexample{The soldiers annihilated their enemy in the attack.（战士们在进攻中歼灭了敌人。）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[*]{nihilism}{'naiilizəm}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 NIHIL}
  \wordsense{n. 虚无主义；无政府状态；恐怖行为}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[*]{nihilist}{'naiilist}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 NIHIL}
  \wordsense{n. 虚无主义者；恐怖主义者}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[*]{nihilistic}{ˌnaii'listik}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 NIHIL}
  \wordsense{a. 虚无主义的；恐怖主义的}
\end{word}

\chapter{PORTION}

\begin{itemize}
  \item 来自拉丁语的 portion 意为 share。
\end{itemize}

\begin{word}[**]{apportion}{ə'pɔ:ʃn}
  \wordbreakdown{给某物分份 ap<ad (= to) + portion (= share)}
  \wordsense{vt. 分配；分摊}
  \wordphrase{apportionment 分配；分摊}
  \wordexample{The judge apportioned the estate in equal shares to the survivors.（法官将财产分给了幸存者。）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[**]{disproportion}{ˌdispra'pɔ:ʃn}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 PORTION}
  \wordsense{n. 不均衡，不均等 *dis (= not), pro (= according to)}
  \wordexample{disproportion in age（年龄的不均衡）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[**]{disproportionate}{ˌdispra'pɔ:ʃənət}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 PORTION}
  \wordsense{a. 不均衡的，不成比例的 *dis (= not), pro (= according to)}
  \wordexample{pay that is disproportionate to the work done（与所做工作不成比例的薪水）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[***]{proportion}{pra'pɔ:ʃn}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 PORTION}
  \wordsense{n. 比例，比率；协调，均衡；部分，份儿；（pl.）面积；容积}
  \wordsense{v. 使均衡；使协调；使成比例 *pro (= according to)}
  \wordexample{proportion of the expenditure to the income（支出占收入的比例） room of good proportions（布置得很协调的房间） large proportion of the earth's surface（地球表面的一大部分） a ship of majestic proportions（大容积轮船） direct / inverse proportion（正 / 反比例）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[**]{proportional}{pra'pɔ:ʃənl}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 PORTION}
  \wordsense{a. 成比例的；均衡的，协调的}
  \wordphrase{proportionate (= proportional)}
  \wordexample{proportional representation（比例代表制）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[***]{portion}{'pɔ:ʃn}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 PORTION}
  \wordsense{n. 一块；部分；份儿；（食物的）一人份；命运}
  \wordsense{v. 划分，分配，分份}
  \wordexample{a portion of land（一块土地） a portion of roast duck（一人份的烤鸭）}
\end{word}

\chapter{PRECI[PRAIS, PRIS, PRIC, PRIZ]}

\begin{itemize}
  \item 来自拉丁语的 preci 意为 price。其变形为 prais, pris, pric, priz。
\end{itemize}

\begin{word}[**]{appreciable}{ə'pri:ʃəbl}
  \wordbreakdown{可以给某物定价的 ap<ad (= to) + preci (= price)}
  \wordsense{a. 可感知的；可观的；可估计的}
  \wordphrase{appreciation 感谢；评价；欣赏；重视}
  \wordphrase{appreciative 欣赏的；感激的}
  \wordphrase{appreciably 相当地；明显地；可察觉地}
  \wordexample{appreciate 感谢；正确评价；欣赏；（充分）意识到}
  \wordexample{My uncle earned an appreciable amount of money in the stock market.（我叔叔在股市赚了一大笔钱。）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[*]{depreciation}{diˌpri:ʃi'eiʃn}
  \wordbreakdown{价格向下、降低 de (= down) + preci (= price)}
  \wordsense{n. 降价，贬值；轻视；折旧}
  \wordphrase{depreciate 降价；轻视，蔑视}
  \wordphrase{depreciatory 降价的；轻视的}
  \wordexample{Capital equipment taxes are calculated after factoring in depreciation.（资本设备税的计算要先考虑折旧因素。）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[***]{precious}{'preʃəs}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 PRECI[PRAIS, PRIS, PRIC, PRIZ]}
  \wordsense{a. 贵重的，珍贵的；《口》十足的；可爱的}
  \wordsense{ad. 非常，很}
  \wordexample{precious metal（贵金属） precious stone（宝石） precious fool（十足的傻瓜） precious cold（非常冷）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[**]{appraise}{ə'preiz}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 PRECI[PRAIS, PRIS, PRIC, PRIZ]}
  \wordsense{v. 评价；估价 *ap<ad (= to), prais<preci (= price)}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[**]{appraisal}{ə'preizəl}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 PRECI[PRAIS, PRIS, PRIC, PRIZ]}
  \wordsense{n. 评价；估价 *ap<ad (= to), prais<preci (= price)}
  \wordexample{interim appraisal（临时 / 中期评估）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[***]{praise}{preiz}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 PRECI[PRAIS, PRIS, PRIC, PRIZ]}
  \wordsense{v./n. 称赞，赞美 *prais<preci (= price)}
  \wordexample{praiseworthy（值得称赞的，可嘉的）}
  \wordexample{win high praise（赢得高度赞扬） in praise of（赞美……）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[**]{price}{prais}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 PRECI[PRAIS, PRIS, PRIC, PRIZ]}
  \wordsense{v. 给……定价；问……的价格}
  \wordsense{n. 价格；代价；赏金}
  \wordexample{pricy（昂贵的）}
  \wordexample{price cartel（价格协定） price index（物价指数） price tag（贴在商品上的价格标签） market price（市价） special price（特价） fixed / set price（固定价格） asking price（要价） at cost price（按成本价） put a price on one's head（悬赏捉拿或处死某人）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[***]{priceless}{'praisləs}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 PRECI[PRAIS, PRIS, PRIC, PRIZ]}
  \wordsense{a. 贵重的，稀世珍宝的；《口》极荒唐的；极有趣的 *pric<preci (= price)}
  \wordexample{priceless paintings（非常贵重的画）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[***]{prize}{praiz}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 PRECI[PRAIS, PRIS, PRIC, PRIZ]}
  \wordsense{n. 奖赏；奖品；赏金；捕获物，战利品；（竞争等的）目标}
  \wordsense{v. 评价；重视}
  \wordsense{a. 该得奖的；了不起的；得奖的；作为奖品的 *priz<preci (= price)}
  \wordexample{prizewinning（获奖的，得奖的）}
  \wordexample{prize for good conduct（善行奖） consolation prizes（安慰奖） prize scholarship（成绩优良奖学金） prize winner（获奖者） prize medal（奖章）}
\end{word}

\chapter{SPIR}

\begin{itemize}
  \item 来自拉丁语的 spir 意为 to breathe。此外，它还有 a coil 的意思。
\end{itemize}

\begin{word}[***]{aspire}{ə'spaiə(r)}
  \wordbreakdown{继续、不停地呼吸 a<ad (= to, intensive) + spir (= breathe)}
  \wordsense{vi. to + sth / do 向往；怀有大志}
  \wordphrase{aspiration 热望 aspirant 有志向的人}
  \wordphrase{aspiring 有志气的，有抱负的}
  \wordexample{A century ago, few little girls aspired to be doctors.（一个世纪以前，几乎没有女孩想当医生。）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[**]{transpire}{træns'paiə(r)}
  \wordbreakdown{通过某物呼吸或小声说话 tran<trans (= through) + spir (= breathe)}
  \wordsense{vi.（秘密等）被发现，被知道}
  \wordsense{vt.（使）散发（水分等），使排出}
  \wordphrase{transpiration 散发，蒸发；泄露}
  \wordexample{After an investigation, it transpired that her own son-in-law had taken the watch.（调查表明，是她的女婿拿走了手表。）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[***]{conspire}{kən'spaiə(r)}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 SPIR}
  \wordsense{v. 共谋；协力，共同促成 *con<com (= together)}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[**]{conspirator}{kən'spirətə(r)}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 SPIR}
  \wordsense{n. 同谋者；阴谋家 *con<com (= together)}
  \wordexample{conspiratorial（同谋者的；阴谋的）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[***]{conspiracy}{kən'spirəsi}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 SPIR}
  \wordsense{n. 共谋；阴谋 *con<com (= together)}
  \wordexample{conspiracy to overthrow the government（颠覆政府的阴谋）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[***]{expire}{ik'spaiə(r)}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 SPIR}
  \wordsense{v. 期满；呼气 *ex (= out), pir<spir (= breathe)}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[**]{expiration}{ˌekspə'reiʃn}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 SPIR}
  \wordsense{n. 期满；呼气 *ex (= out), pir<spir (= breathe)}
  \wordexample{at the expiration of the lease（在租期期满时）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[*]{expiry}{ik'spairi}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 SPIR}
  \wordsense{n. 终结，期满 *ex (= out), pir<spir (= breathe)}
  \wordexample{expiry of a driving license（驾驶执照到期）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[***]{inspire}{in'spaiə(r)}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 SPIR}
  \wordsense{v. 赋予……灵感；鼓舞；（文章、话等）给以启示；授意发表（报道等） *in (= into)}
  \wordexample{inspiring（鼓舞的，激励人心的）}
  \wordexample{inspired artists（富有灵感的诗人） inspired article（授意发表的文章）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[***]{inspiration}{ˌinspə'reiʃn}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 SPIR}
  \wordsense{n. 给予灵感的人（或物）；鼓舞人心的人（或物）；（源自灵感的）好办法，好主意 *in (= into)}
  \wordexample{draw inspiration from nature（从自然中获取灵感） have a sudden inspiration（突然想起一个好主意）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[**]{perspire}{pə'spaiə(r)}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 SPIR}
  \wordsense{v. 流汗；《喻》（流汗）劳作 *per (= through)}
  \wordexample{perspiration（汗水；出汗）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[*]{respire}{ri'spaiə(r)}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 SPIR}
  \wordsense{v. 呼吸 *re (= again)}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[**]{respiration}{ˌrespə'reiʃn}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 SPIR}
  \wordsense{n. 呼吸；一次呼吸 *re (= again)}
  \wordexample{artificial respiration（人工呼吸）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[*]{respirator}{'respəreitə(r)}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 SPIR}
  \wordsense{n. 口罩；人工呼吸机 *re (= again)}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[**]{respiratory}{ri'spirətri}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 SPIR}
  \wordsense{a. 呼吸的 *re (= again)}
  \wordexample{respiratory organs / system（呼吸器官 / 系统） respiratory diseases（呼吸系统疾病） Respiratory Distress Syndrome（（新生儿的）肺透明膜病）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[*]{suspiration}{ˌsʌspə'reiʃn}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 SPIR}
  \wordsense{n. 叹气，叹息 *sus<sub (= under), pir<spir (= breathe)}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[***]{spirit}{'spirit}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 SPIR}
  \wordsense{n. 精神，心灵；灵魂；幽灵；（具有特定品质的）人物；勇气；活力；性格；情绪，心情；态度；时代精神，风气；酒精；（pl.）烈酒}
  \wordsense{v. 神秘地带走}
  \wordexample{the abode of spirits（灵魂的安息处） the work of spirits（幽灵的所为） master spirit（大师） imperturbable spirit（不易激动的性格） say in a kind spirit（亲切地说） in high / low spirits（兴高采烈 / 情绪低落） the spirit of the times（时代精神） a glass of spirit and water（一杯掺了水的烈酒）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[**]{spirited}{'spiritid}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 SPIR}
  \wordsense{a. 活泼的，生机勃勃的；【构成复合词】有心情或情绪的；猛烈的}
  \wordexample{spiritless（无精打采的，垂头丧气的）}
  \wordexample{spirited attack / defense / reply（猛烈的攻击 / 勇敢的防御 / 热烈的回应） spirited conversation（热烈的对话） high-spirited / low-spirited（兴致勃勃的 / 没精打采的）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[***]{spiritual}{'spiritʃuəl}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 SPIR}
  \wordsense{a. 精神上的，心灵的；宗教的}
  \wordsense{n.《美》黑人灵歌}
  \wordexample{spiritually（精神上）}
  \wordexample{spirituality（灵性；神圣） spiritualism（招魂论，招魂术；唯心论） Spiritualist（招魂论者）}
  \wordexample{spiritualize（使精神化；使内心纯净；使变高尚）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[*]{spirituous}{'spiritjuəs}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 SPIR}
  \wordsense{a.（液体）含有酒精的}
  \wordexample{spirituous liquors（烈酒（如威士忌））}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[**]{sprightly}{'spraitli}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 SPIR}
  \wordsense{a. 活泼的，生机勃勃的 *spr<spir (= breathe)}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[***]{spiral}{'spaiərəl}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 SPIR}
  \wordsense{a. 螺旋形的；螺线的}
  \wordsense{n. 螺旋；螺旋形的东西；螺旋弹簧；（物价等的）连续急剧上升或下降}
  \wordsense{v. 使成螺旋形；螺旋式移动；（物价等）不断急剧地上升或下降 *spir (= a coil)}
  \wordexample{spiral staircase（螺旋形楼梯） spiral line（螺旋线） spiral down（螺旋式下降） inflationary spiral（螺旋形膨胀）}
  \wordexample{Prices are still spiraling.（物价还在急剧上升。）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[***]{spire}{'spaiə(r)}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 SPIR}
  \wordsense{n. 尖塔；圆锥形建筑物 *spir (= a coil)}
\end{word}

\chapter{SIMIL[SIMUL]}

\begin{itemize}
  \item 来自拉丁语的 simil 意为 same, equal，元音弱化后变成了 simul。同义词根有来自拉丁语的 equ, par, sembl, ident 等和来自希腊语的 tauto。
\end{itemize}

\begin{word}[**]{assimilate}{ə'simileit}
  \wordbreakdown{使几乎相同 as<ad (= to, near) + simil (= same)}
  \wordsense{vt. 使同化；把……比作；消化；理解}
  \wordphrase{assimilation 同化；消化}
  \wordexample{It's difficult to assimilate so much information in a 1-hour lecture.（用一个小时的课程来消化这么多的信息是有难度的。）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[*]{dissimulate}{di'simjuleit}
  \wordbreakdown{使不相同 dis (= not) + simul<simil (= same)}
  \wordsense{vt. 掩饰（情感、动机等）；装假}
  \wordphrase{dissimulation 掩饰；装假}
  \wordexample{Susan's efforts to dissimulate her feelings of inadequacy are a sign of immaturity.（苏珊试图掩饰自己无法胜任的感觉，这说明她还不够成熟。）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[**]{simulate}{'simjuleit}
  \wordbreakdown{使相同 simul<simil (= same)}
  \wordsense{vt. 假装；模仿；模拟}
  \wordexample{simulation 假装；模仿；模拟 simulator（为实验准备的）模拟装置}
  \wordexample{I only simulate interest in her lectures because I think she's actually boring.（我只是假装对她的讲座很感兴趣，因为我觉得她实际上很无聊。）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[*]{facsimile}{fæk'siməli}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 SIMIL[SIMUL]}
  \wordsense{n.（笔迹、印刷品、画等的）摹本；【电信】电传真 *fac (= make)}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[**]{similarity}{ˌsimə'lærəti}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 SIMIL[SIMUL]}
  \wordsense{n. 类似（点），相似（处）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[***]{similar}{'similə(r)}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 SIMIL[SIMUL]}
  \wordsense{a. 类似的}
  \wordexample{similarly（类似地；一样地）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[**]{simile}{'simili}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 SIMIL[SIMUL]}
  \wordsense{n. 明喻}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[**]{similitude}{si'militju:d}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 SIMIL[SIMUL]}
  \wordsense{n. 类似，相似}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[*]{simulacrum}{ˌsimju'leikram}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 SIMIL[SIMUL]}
  \wordsense{n. 幻影；假象 *acr (= sharp)}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[**]{simultaneous}{ˌsiməl'teiniəs}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 SIMIL[SIMUL]}
  \wordsense{a. 同步的，同时发生的}
  \wordexample{simultaneously（同时地）}
  \wordexample{simultaneity（同时发生；同时完成）}
  \wordexample{simultaneous interpreter（同声传译员）}
\end{word}

\chapter{SUR}

\begin{itemize}
  \item 来自拉丁语的 sur 意为 certain。
\end{itemize}

\begin{word}[***]{assurance}{ə'ʃuərəns}
  \wordbreakdown{对于某事很确信 as<ad (= to) + sur (= certain)}
  \wordsense{n. 保证；表示保证的话；信心}
  \wordphrase{assure 使确信；使放心}
  \wordphrase{assured 确定的；有保证的；自信的}
  \wordphrase{assuredly 确信地；自信地}
  \wordexample{The doctor gave me every assurance that my cancer is curable.（医生使我确信我得的癌症是可以治愈的。）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[**]{ensure}{in'ʃuə(r)}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 SUR}
  \wordsense{v. 使确信，保证；使安全 *en (= make)}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[***]{insure}{in'ʃuə(r)}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 SUR}
  \wordsense{v. 确保，保证；投保 *in (= to)}
  \wordexample{the insurer（保险业者，保险公司） insurant（被保险人；投保人）}
  \wordexample{the insured（被保险人）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[***]{insurance}{in'ʃuərəns}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 SUR}
  \wordsense{n. 保险（业）；赔偿费；保险金额；保险契约 *in (= to)}
  \wordexample{insurance policy（保险契约，保险单） accident insurance（意外保险） automobile insurance（汽车保险） aviation insurance（航空保险） endowment insurance（养老保险） life insurance（人寿保险） marine insurance（海上保险） insurance premium（保险费）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[***]{reassure}{ˌri:ə'ʃuə(r)}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 SUR}
  \wordsense{v. 使放心；再保证 *re (= again), as<ad (= to)}
  \wordexample{reassurance（再保证）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[*]{reassuring}{ˌri:ə'ʃuəriŋ}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 SUR}
  \wordsense{a. 令人安心的；安慰的 *re (= again), as<ad (= to)}
  \wordexample{reassuring word / pat（令人安心的话 / 安慰的轻拍）}
\end{word}

\chapter{CLIM}

\begin{itemize}
  \item 来自拉丁语的 clim 意为 ladder, slope。
\end{itemize}

\begin{word}[*]{acclimate}{'ækləmeit}
  \wordbreakdown{向某事物倾斜 ac<ad (= to) + clim (= ladder, slope)}
  \wordsense{vt. oneself + to + sth 使适应，使顺应}
  \wordsense{vi. 习惯，适应}
  \wordphrase{acclimation / acclimatization 顺应}
  \wordexample{It takes athletes several days to acclimate to high altitude venues.（运动员们需要几天的时间来适应高海拔的比赛地点。）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[***]{climax}{'klaimæks}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 CLIM}
  \wordsense{n. 顶点，高潮；性高潮（= orgasm）}
  \wordsense{v. （使）达到高潮}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[*]{climacteric}{klai'mæktərik}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 CLIM}
  \wordsense{n. 更年期；绝经期}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[*]{climactic}{klai'mæktik}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 CLIM}
  \wordsense{a. 顶点的，高潮的}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[**]{climber}{'klaimə(r)}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 CLIM}
  \wordsense{n. 攀登者；《口》（在社会地位等方面）拼命向上爬的人，野心家}
  \wordexample{climbing（攀登）}
  \wordexample{climb-down（放弃原来坚持的论点（或立场）；让步）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[*]{anticlimax}{ˌænti'klaimæks}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 CLIM}
  \wordsense{n.【语】突降法；虎头蛇尾 *anti (= against, opposite)}
\end{word}

\chapter{ALI, ALTER[ULTER, ALTRU]}

\begin{itemize}
  \item 来自拉丁语的 ali, alter 意为 other。其变形有 ulter, altru 等。同义词根有来自希腊语的 all。
\end{itemize}

\begin{word}[**]{adulterate}{ə'dʌltəreit}
  \wordbreakdown{添加别的东西 ad (= to, add) + ulter<alter (= other)}
  \wordsense{vt. 掺杂，掺假}
  \wordphrase{adulteration 混合，掺和；掺假}
  \wordexample{Cocaine dealers often adulterate the drug with harmless powder.（可卡因贩卖商常常将无害的粉末掺在可卡因中。）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[**]{alienate}{ˈeɪliəneit}
  \wordbreakdown{使具备其他性质 ali (= other)}
  \wordsense{vt. 使孤立，使疏远；【律】让渡}
  \wordphrase{alienation 孤立，疏远；让渡}
  \wordexample{You're likely to alienate a lot of customers with this price increase.（这样提高价格很可能会使你和很多顾客疏远。）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[**]{altercation}{ˌɔːltəˈkeiʃn}
  \wordbreakdown{彼此意见不同 alter (= other)}
  \wordsense{n. 争论，激烈的争吵}
  \wordexample{The officers responded to reports of an altercation in apartment 3D.（警察们在接到 3D 号公寓内有口角冲突的报告后立即出动。）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[**]{altruistic}{ˌæltruˈistik}
  \wordbreakdown{向着其他人的 altru(alter (= other))}
  \wordsense{a. 利他的}
  \wordexample{He's very altruistic and devotes himself to good works.（他总是想着别人，常做好事。）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[***]{alien}{ˈeɪliən}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 ALI, ALTER[ULTER, ALTRU]}
  \wordsense{a. 外国的；性质不同的；（想法等）不相容的 n. 外国人}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[**]{inalienable}{ɪnˈeɪliənəbl}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 ALI, ALTER[ULTER, ALTRU]}
  \wordsense{a. 不能让与的 *in (= not)}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[**]{alias}{ˈeɪliəs}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 ALI, ALTER[ULTER, ALTRU]}
  \wordsense{n.（为隐藏身份而使用的）化名，别名 ad. 化名为}
  \wordexample{The criminal had several aliases.（罪犯曾有多个化名。）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[**]{alibi}{ˈælɪbaɪ}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 ALI, ALTER[ULTER, ALTRU]}
  \wordsense{n. 不在犯罪现场的证明；辩解 *bi (= place)}
  \wordexample{The accused man was able to prove / establish / set up an alibi.（被告可以证明自己不在犯罪现场。）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[**]{adultery}{əˈdʌltəri}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 ALI, ALTER[ULTER, ALTRU]}
  \wordsense{n. 通奸 *ad (= add), ulter<alter (= other)}
  \wordexample{adulterer（奸夫） adulteress（奸妇）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[*]{adulterous}{əˈdʌltərəs}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 ALI, ALTER[ULTER, ALTRU]}
  \wordsense{a. 通奸的 *ad (= add), ulter<alter (= other)}
  \wordexample{adulterous woman（通奸的女人）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[***]{alter}{ˈɔːltə(r)}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 ALI, ALTER[ULTER, ALTRU]}
  \wordsense{v. 改变，变更；修改（成衣的）尺寸}
  \wordexample{alterable（可改变的；可修改的）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[***]{alteration}{ˌɔːltəˈreiʃn}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 ALI, ALTER[ULTER, ALTRU]}
  \wordsense{n. 变更；修改（成衣的）尺寸}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[*]{alter ego}{ˌɔːltər ˈiːɡəʊ}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 ALI, ALTER[ULTER, ALTRU]}
  \wordsense{n. 第二自我；至交 *ego (= self)}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[***]{alternate}{ˈɔːltəneit; ɔːlˈtɜːnət}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 ALI, ALTER[ULTER, ALTRU]}
  \wordsense{a. 轮流的，交替的；间隔的；（叶子）互生的；供选择的}
  \wordsense{n. 替补者；候补者；代理人}
  \wordsense{v. 交替；轮流}
  \wordexample{alternately（轮流地；交替地；间隔地）}
  \wordexample{on alternate days（隔一天）}
  \wordexample{Day alternates with night.（日夜交替。）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[***]{alternative}{ɔːlˈtɜːnətɪv}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 ALI, ALTER[ULTER, ALTRU]}
  \wordsense{n. 二择一；可选择的办法}
  \wordsense{a. 两者中择一的；供选择的}
  \wordexample{alternatively（两者中择一地）}
  \wordexample{alternative plan（供选择的计划）}
\end{word}

\chapter{FIL}

\begin{itemize}
  \item 来自拉丁语的 fil 意为 son, thread, foul。
\end{itemize}

\begin{word}[**]{affiliate}{əˈfɪlieit; əˈfɪliət}
  \wordbreakdown{形成近乎和儿子一样的关系 af<ad (= to, near) + fil (= son)}
  \wordsense{vt. sb + with + sth 使形成紧密关系；使……加入，使隶属于……}
  \wordsense{vi. with + sth 发生联系，参加}
  \wordsense{n. 分会，分公司；成员}
  \wordphrase{affiliation 联系；从属关系}
  \wordexample{The state democratic party affiliated four local party groups last year.（民主党去年吸纳了四个地方党组织。）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[***]{defile}{dɪˈfaɪl}
  \wordbreakdown{使变得非常脏 de (= intensive) + fil (= foul)}
  \wordsense{vt. 弄脏；亵渎}
  \wordphrase{defilement 弄脏}
  \wordexample{The mountain stream was defiled by the town's raw sewage.（该市未经处理的污水污染了山上流下来的溪水。）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[**]{filial}{ˈfɪliəl}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 FIL}
  \wordsense{a. 子女的；子代的；孝顺的}
  \wordexample{filial duty（作为子女的义务）}
  \wordexample{filial piety to parents（对父母的孝道）}
  \wordexample{the first / second filial generation（杂交第一 / 二代）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[*]{filicide}{ˈfɪlɪsaɪd}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 FIL}
  \wordsense{n. 杀害子女（者） *cid (= kill)}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[***]{filament}{ˈfɪləmənt}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 FIL}
  \wordsense{n. 细丝；单纤维；（雄蕊的）花丝；（电灯泡、电子管的）灯丝 *fil (= thread)}
  \wordexample{filamentous（丝状的）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[*]{filature}{ˈfɪlətʃə(r)}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 FIL}
  \wordsense{n. 缫丝；缫丝厂 *fil (= thread)}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[***]{file}{faɪl}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 FIL}
  \wordsense{n. 文件夹；档案；（排队的人、物的）列}
  \wordsense{v. 存档；排成纵列行进；提出（申请、抗议等）；提起（诉讼） *fil (= thread)}
  \wordexample{file cabinet（文件柜）}
  \wordexample{file number（文档编号）}
  \wordexample{file punch（文件穿孔器）}
  \wordexample{on file（存档）}
  \wordexample{in single file（成一列纵队）}
  \wordexample{the rank and file（普通士兵；庶民）}
  \wordexample{file suit for a divorce（提起离婚诉讼）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[**]{filings}{ˈfaɪlɪŋz}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 FIL}
  \wordsense{n. 锉屑 *fil (= thread)}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[**]{fillet}{ˈfɪlɪt}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 FIL}
  \wordsense{n.（用做装饰的）带子；（去掉骨头的）肉片，鱼片}
  \wordsense{v. 把（鱼、肉）切成片 *fil (= thread)}
  \wordexample{filleted plaice（切成片的鲽鱼）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[***]{profile}{ˈprəʊfaɪl}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 FIL}
  \wordsense{n. 人物简介；侧影，侧面；轮廓}
  \wordsense{v. 画出……的轮廓；勾画侧面图；写人物简介 *pro (= before), fil (= thread)}
  \wordexample{portrait drawn in profile（侧影肖像）}
  \wordexample{line of hills profiled against the night sky（以夜空为背景的山的轮廓）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[**]{filth}{fɪlθ}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 FIL}
  \wordsense{n. 污物，肮脏；淫猥 *fil (= foul)}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[***]{filthy}{ˈfɪlθi}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 FIL}
  \wordsense{a. 肮脏的；淫猥的 *fil (= foul)}
  \wordexample{filthy lucre（肮脏的钱财）}
\end{word}

\chapter{LEV[LIEV]}

\begin{itemize}
  \item 来自拉丁语的 lev 意为 to raise, to lift, light, smooth 等。其变形为 liev。
\end{itemize}

\begin{word}[**]{alleviate}{əˈliːvieit}
  \wordbreakdown{使变得更轻 al<ad (= to, add) + lev (= light, lift)}
  \wordsense{vt. 减轻（痛苦等），缓解}
  \wordphrase{alleviation 减轻，缓解}
  \wordexample{Aspirin usually alleviates moderate pain symptoms.（通常阿司匹林可以缓解轻度疼痛。）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[**]{irrelevant}{ɪˈreləvənt}
  \wordbreakdown{不能再举起的 ir<in (= not) + re (= again) + lev (= lift, light)}
  \wordsense{a. 不恰当的，不切题的；无关系的}
  \wordphrase{irrelevance / irrelevancy 不恰当，不对题；无关系}
  \wordexample{My professor said the third paragraph of my essay is irrelevant.（教授说我论文的第三段与论文整体没有关联。）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[**]{levity}{ˈlevəti}
  \wordbreakdown{轻浮的行为 lev (= light, lift)}
  \wordsense{n. 轻率；轻浮}
  \wordexample{I enjoy our professor's levity. It makes the hour go faster.（我喜欢我们教授轻松的风格，因为这让时间过得很快。）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[*]{relevant}{ˈreləvənt}
  \wordbreakdown{再次举起的 re (= again) + lev (= lift, light)}
  \wordsense{a. 有关系的，有关联的；恰当的}
  \wordphrase{relevance / relevancy 相关性；恰当}
  \wordphrase{relevantly 恰当地}
  \wordexample{The bibliography contains items relevant to the subject of cardiopulmonary health.（参考文献目录中包含与心肺健康这一主题相关的条目。）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[***]{elevate}{ˈeliveit}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 LEV[LIEV]}
  \wordsense{v. 举起；提高 *e<ex (= out), lev (= lift)}
  \wordexample{elevate the voice（提高嗓音）}
  \wordexample{elevated railway / railroad（高架铁道）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[***]{elevation}{ˌelɪˈveiʃn}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 LEV[LIEV]}
  \wordsense{n. 高度，海拔；提高；高尚；（炮的）仰角；（建筑物的）立视图 *e<ex (= out), lev (= lift)}
  \wordexample{elevation of 3,000 meters（海拔 3,000 米）}
  \wordexample{elevation of thought（思想的高尚）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[***]{elevator}{ˈeliveitə(r)}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 LEV[LIEV]}
  \wordsense{n. 电梯；升降机 *e<ex (= out), lev (= lift)}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[**]{lever}{ˈliːvə(r)}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 LEV[LIEV]}
  \wordsense{n. 杠杆；控制杆；手段}
  \wordsense{v. 用杠杆移动 *lev (= lift)}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[*]{leverage}{ˈliːvərɪdʒ}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 LEV[LIEV]}
  \wordsense{n. 杠杆作用；杠杆装置；（为达到某一目的而使用的）手段 *lev (= lift)}
  \wordexample{political leverage（政治手段）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[*]{levitate}{ˈleviteit}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 LEV[LIEV]}
  \wordsense{v.（使）飘浮；（使）升空 *lev (= lift)}
  \wordexample{levitation（依靠超自然力量的空中飘浮）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[***]{levy}{ˈlevi}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 LEV[LIEV]}
  \wordsense{v. 征收（税金等）；征集，召集；发动与……的战争（\textasciitilde{} on）；（依据法律）扣押}
  \wordsense{n. 课税，征税；征集；征兵 *lev (= light)}
  \wordexample{levy a tax / a fine / a ransom on（向……征收税金 / 罚金 / 索取赎金）}
  \wordexample{levy on a person's property / estate（扣押某人的财产 / 不动产）}
  \wordexample{capital levy（资产税）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[***]{relieve}{rɪˈliːv}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 LEV[LIEV]}
  \wordsense{v. 减轻（痛苦、负担等）；救济；换班；使解除；使突出，使醒目 *re (= again), liev<lev (= lift)}
  \wordexample{relief（减轻；宽慰；救济；救济品；换班）}
  \wordexample{relieve one's feelings（（哭喊或打闹以）发泄情绪）}
  \wordexample{relieve oneself / nature / the bowels（排泄，方便）}
\end{word}

\chapter{LUD, LUS}

\begin{itemize}
  \item 来自拉丁语的 lud, lus 意为 to laugh, to play。
\end{itemize}

\begin{word}[***]{allude}{əˈluːd}
  \wordbreakdown{对某事发笑 al<ad (= to) + lud (= laugh, play)}
  \wordsense{vi. to + sth 暗指；间接提到}
  \wordphrase{allusion 暗指}
  \wordphrase{allusive 暗指的}
  \wordexample{Her drooping eyes allude to her profound fatigue.（她双眼低垂，说明她非常疲倦。）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[**]{collusion}{kəˈluːʒn}
  \wordbreakdown{一起笑 col<com (= together) + lus (= laugh, play)}
  \wordsense{n. 同谋，勾结}
  \wordphrase{collude 同谋}
  \wordphrase{collusive 同谋的}
  \wordexample{The airlines are sometimes thought to be guilty of collusion in ticket pricing.（有时航空公司会被指责相互串通垄断机票价格。）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[**]{delude}{dɪˈluːd}
  \wordbreakdown{由于可笑而使某人脱离正常状态 de (= from) + lud (= laugh, play)}
  \wordsense{vt. 欺骗；哄骗；迷惑}
  \wordphrase{delusion 迷惑，欺瞒；错觉}
  \wordphrase{delusive 欺骗的；妄想的}
  \wordexample{He deludes himself that he is handsome.（他自欺地认为自己长得很帅。）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[**]{elude}{ɪˈluːd}
  \wordbreakdown{笑着从危险状况中摆脱出来 e<ex (= out) + lud (= laugh, play)}
  \wordsense{vt.（巧妙地）逃脱，摆脱}
  \wordphrase{elusive 逃避的}
  \wordphrase{elusion 回避；逃跑}
  \wordexample{The criminal eluded the cops by stealing a car and driving away.（犯人躲开警察偷了一辆车逃跑了。）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[***]{illusion}{ɪˈluːʒn}
  \wordbreakdown{头脑对某事物闹着玩 il<in (= on) + lus (= laugh, play)}
  \wordsense{n. 幻想；错觉；假象}
  \wordphrase{illusionist 魔术师；空想家}
  \wordphrase{illusive / illusory 幻影的；错觉的；迷惑人的}
  \wordexample{Many old maids hold the illusion of perfect marriage well into their fifties.（许多老处女在五十岁以后仍然幻想着拥有完美的婚姻。）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[**]{ludicrous}{ˈluːdɪkrəs}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 LUD, LUS}
  \wordsense{a. 滑稽的，可笑的 *lud (= laugh)}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[**]{prelude}{ˈpreljuːd}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 LUD, LUS}
  \wordsense{n. 前奏曲；序幕}
  \wordsense{v. 作为……的前奏（或序幕） *pre (= before), lud (= play)}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[**]{interlude}{ˈɪntəluːd}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 LUD, LUS}
  \wordsense{n. 间奏；（话剧或歌剧等的）幕间；穿插事件 *inter (= between), lud (= play)}
  \wordexample{interludes of bright weather（坏天气中间或有的晴天）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[*]{postlude}{ˈpəʊstluːd}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 LUD, LUS}
  \wordsense{n. 后奏曲 *post (= after), lud (= play)}
\end{word}

\chapter{PALL}

\begin{itemize}
  \item 来自拉丁语的 pall 意为 pale。
\end{itemize}

\begin{word}[**]{appall}{əˈpɔːl}
  \wordbreakdown{让某物变得苍白 ap<ad (= to) + pall (= pale)}
  \wordsense{vt. 使惊骇}
  \wordphrase{appalling 骇人听闻的}
  \wordphrase{appallingly 令人毛骨悚然地}
  \wordexample{The way he beats his dog appalls me.（他打狗的样子令我毛骨悚然。）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[**]{pallid}{ˈpælɪd}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 PALL}
  \wordsense{a. 无血色的，苍白的}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[**]{pallor}{ˈpælə(r)}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 PALL}
  \wordsense{n.（脸的）苍白}
\end{word}

\chapter{PREHEND, PREHENS[PREN, PREGN, PRIEV]}

\begin{itemize}
  \item 来自拉丁语的 prehend, prehens 意为 to take, to seize。其变形有 pren, pregn, priev 等。同义词根有来自拉丁语的 cap / capt / cept / ceiv[cip, cup, ceit], empt / em, rap / rav, sump / sumpt, lab / lep 等。
\end{itemize}

\begin{word}[**]{apprehensive}{ˌæprɪˈhensɪv}
  \wordbreakdown{抓得很近的 ap<ad (= to, near) + prehens (= take)}
  \wordsense{a. 忧虑的，担心的；理解快的}
  \wordphrase{apprehension 忧虑；逮捕；理解}
  \wordphrase{apprehensible 可理解的}
  \wordphrase{apprehend 逮捕；忧虑；理解}
  \wordexample{Officials are apprehensive about possible terrorist attacks.（官员们担心可能发生的恐怖袭击。）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[**]{incomprehensible}{ˌɪnkɒmprɪˈhensəbl}
  \wordbreakdown{根本无法抓住的 in (= not) + com (= thoroughly) + prehens (= take)}
  \wordsense{a. 不能理解的}
  \wordphrase{incomprehension 不了解}
  \wordexample{I've studied French for months, but I still find most conversations incomprehensible.（我已经学了好几个月法语了，但我发现对大部分对话仍无法理解。）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[**]{reprehensible}{ˌreprɪˈhensəbl}
  \wordbreakdown{向后、逆着抓住的 re (= back, against) + prehens (= take)}
  \wordsense{a. 应受指责的}
  \wordphrase{reprehend 责备，责难}
  \wordphrase{reprehension 非难，指责}
  \wordexample{You should be ashamed of your reprehensible behavior last night.（你应该为你昨晚应受指责的行为感到羞愧。）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[**]{misapprehension}{ˌmɪsæprɪˈhenʃn}
  \wordbreakdown{接受错 mis (= bad) + ap<ad (= intensive) + prehens (= take)}
  \wordsense{n. 误解}
  \wordphrase{misapprehend 误解，误会}
  \wordexample{I infer you're suffering from the misapprehension that I give a damn.（你好像误会我了，以为我是在谴责你。）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[**]{reprieve}{rɪˈpriːv}
  \wordbreakdown{抓住放在背后 re (= back) + priev<prehend (= take)}
  \wordsense{n. 缓刑（令）；暂时缓解}
  \wordsense{vt. 暂缓对……处刑；暂时缓解}
  \wordexample{Every death row prisoner dreams of a reprieve before the awful day.（所有的死刑犯在那个可怕的日子来临之前都梦想着能获得缓刑。）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[***]{comprehend}{ˌkɒmprɪˈhend}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 PREHEND, PREHENS[PREN, PREGN, PRIEV]}
  \wordsense{v.（充分）理解 *com (= completely)}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[***]{comprehensible}{ˌkɒmprɪˈhensəbl}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 PREHEND, PREHENS[PREN, PREGN, PRIEV]}
  \wordsense{a. 能（充分）理解的 *com (= completely)}
  \wordexample{comprehensibility（能理解）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[**]{comprehension}{ˌkɒmprɪˈhenʃn}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 PREHEND, PREHENS[PREN, PREGN, PRIEV]}
  \wordsense{n. 理解（力）；理解力测验 *com (= completely)}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[***]{comprehensive}{ˌkɒmprɪˈhensɪv}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 PREHEND, PREHENS[PREN, PREGN, PRIEV]}
  \wordsense{a. 理解的；综合的 *com (= completely)}
  \wordexample{comprehensive description（全面的说明）}
  \wordexample{man with a comprehensive mind（有理解力的人）}
  \wordexample{comprehensive examination（综合考试）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[*]{prehensile}{prɪˈhensaɪl}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 PREHEND, PREHENS[PREN, PREGN, PRIEV]}
  \wordsense{a. 能抓住的}
  \wordexample{the prehensile trunk of an elephant（能抓住东西的大象鼻子）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[***]{apprentice}{əˈprentɪs}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 PREHEND, PREHENS[PREN, PREGN, PRIEV]}
  \wordsense{n. 学徒；见习生；初学者}
  \wordsense{v. 当学徒 *ap<ad (= near), prent<prehend (= take)}
  \wordexample{apprenticeship（学徒的身份；学徒期）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[**]{entrepreneur}{ˌɒntrəprəˈnɜː(r)}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 PREHEND, PREHENS[PREN, PREGN, PRIEV]}
  \wordsense{n. 企业家；创业者 *entr<inter (= between), pren<prehend (= take)}
  \wordexample{entrepreneurial（企业家的；创业者的）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[**]{impregnable}{ɪmˈpreɡnəbl}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 PREHEND, PREHENS[PREN, PREGN, PRIEV]}
  \wordsense{a. 攻不破的 *im<in (= not), pregn<prehend (= take)}
  \wordexample{impregnability（攻不破）}
  \wordexample{impregnable defenses（坚不可摧的防御）}
  \wordexample{impregnable argument（无懈可击的辩论）}
\end{word}

\chapter{CERT}

\begin{itemize}
  \item 来自拉丁语的词根 cert 意为 sure。
\end{itemize}

\begin{word}[**]{ascertain}{ˌæsəˈtein}
  \wordbreakdown{使自己确信 as<ad (= to) + cert (= sure)}
  \wordsense{vt. 确认；查清}
  \wordphrase{ascertainable 可确定的}
  \wordphrase{ascertainment 确定}
  \wordexample{It was not possible to ascertain her whereabouts.（根本不可能查出她的行踪。）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[***]{certain}{ˈsɜːtn}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 CERT}
  \wordsense{a. 确信的，确凿的；某个；一些}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[***]{certainly}{ˈsɜːtnli}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 CERT}
  \wordsense{ad. 无疑地；必定；（用于回答）当然}
  \wordexample{Certainly not!（当然不是！）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[***]{certainty}{ˈsɜːtnti}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 CERT}
  \wordsense{n. 必定的事；确实性}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[**]{certify}{ˈsɜːtɪfaɪ}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 CERT}
  \wordsense{v. 证明；保证}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[**]{certified}{ˈsɜːtɪfaɪd}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 CERT}
  \wordsense{a. 被证明的；有保证的}
  \wordexample{certified check（保付支票）}
  \wordexample{certified mail（挂号信）}
  \wordexample{certified public accountant（执业会计师，缩写：C.P.A.）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[***]{certifiable}{ˈsɜːtɪfaɪəbl}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 CERT}
  \wordsense{a. 可证明的；可保证的；可证明有精神病的 *fic (= make)}
  \wordexample{certifiable lunatic（被证明为精神错乱的）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[***]{certificate}{səˈtɪfɪkət}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 CERT}
  \wordsense{n. 证明书}
  \wordsense{v. 发证书给…… *fic (= make)}
  \wordexample{certificated teachers（正式教师）}
  \wordexample{birth certificate（出生证明）}
  \wordexample{marriage certificate（结婚证书）}
  \wordexample{health certificate（健康证明）}
  \wordexample{medical certificate（诊断书）}
  \wordexample{certificate of attendance（在读证明）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[*]{certification}{ˌsɜːtɪfɪˈkeiʃn}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 CERT}
  \wordsense{n. 证明；保证 *fic (= make)}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[*]{certitude}{ˈsɜːtɪtjuːd}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 CERT}
  \wordsense{n. 确实（性）}
\end{word}

\chapter{SENT, SENS}

\begin{itemize}
  \item 来自拉丁语的 sent, sens 意为 to feel。同义词根有来自希腊语的 path, (a)esthes / (a)esthet 和来自拉丁语的 pat / pass。
\end{itemize}

\begin{word}[***]{assent}{əˈsent}
  \wordbreakdown{想法就在眼前 as<ad (= to, near) + sent (= feel)}
  \wordsense{vi. to + sth 同意}
  \wordsense{n. 同意}
  \wordphrase{assentation 迎合，附和}
  \wordexample{With your assent, I'd like to close the shop early today.（如果您同意的话，今天我想早点关店门。）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[**]{consensus}{kənˈsensəs}
  \wordbreakdown{想法一致 con<com (= with) + sens (= feel)}
  \wordsense{n. 一致；舆论}
  \wordphrase{consensual 在双方同意下成立的}
  \wordexample{The budget committee reached consensus about cutting costs by 10\% next year.（预算委员会达成一致意见，将明年的开支减少 10\%。）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[**]{dissent}{dɪˈsent}
  \wordbreakdown{想法分别不同 dis (= apart) + sent (= feel)}
  \wordsense{n. 不赞成，异议}
  \wordsense{vi. 持异议，不同意；不信奉英国国教}
  \wordphrase{dissension 意见分歧；纷争}
  \wordphrase{dissenter 不赞成者，反对者；不信奉英国国教的人}
  \wordexample{Voices of dissent are welcomed in a true democracy.（真正的民主欢迎反对的声音。）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[**]{presentiment}{prɪˈzentɪmənt}
  \wordbreakdown{事先的感觉 pre (= before) + sens (= feel)}
  \wordsense{n. 预感}
  \wordexample{I've had a presentiment all day that something extraordinary is going to happen.（我一整天都感觉有什么特别的事要发生。）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[***]{resentment}{rɪˈzentmənt}
  \wordbreakdown{再一次痛彻心扉的感受 re (= again, back, against) + sens (= feel)}
  \wordsense{n. 愤怒；怨恨}
  \wordphrase{resent 愤慨；怨恨}
  \wordphrase{resentful 愤慨的，怨恨的}
  \wordexample{I felt a lot of resentment when I was passed over again for a promotion.（又一次没能晋升，我很愤怒。）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[**]{sententious}{senˈtenʃəs}
  \wordbreakdown{使感受的 sens (= feel)}
  \wordsense{a. 说教的；爱用警句的；简洁的}
  \wordphrase{sentence 句子；判决}
  \wordexample{She gave the standard sententious commencement speech, nothing special.（她的毕业典礼致词是标准的说教性的，毫无特别之处。）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[***]{consent}{kənˈsent}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 SENT, SENS}
  \wordsense{v. 同意，准许}
  \wordsense{n. 同意，准许 *con<com (= together)}
  \wordexample{age of consent（承诺年龄，指法律上被认为可以进行性行为或结婚的年龄）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[***]{sense}{sens}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 SENT, SENS}
  \wordsense{n. 官能（指视觉、听觉、嗅觉、味觉、触觉）；辨别力；感觉；意识；意义，意思；（pl.）理智}
  \wordsense{v. 感觉到；察觉；意识到}
  \wordexample{sense organ（感觉器官，如耳朵、眼睛等）}
  \wordexample{common sense（常识）}
  \wordexample{a sense of humor（幽默感）}
  \wordexample{a sense of locality / direction（位置感 / 方向感）}
  \wordexample{make sense（讲得通）}
  \wordexample{come to one's senses（恢复知觉）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[***]{senseless}{ˈsensləs}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 SENT, SENS}
  \wordsense{a. 愚蠢的；不省人事的，无意识的 *less (= without)}
  \wordexample{senseless idea（愚蠢的想法）}
  \wordexample{fall senseless to the ground（昏倒在地）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[***]{sensible}{ˈsensəbl}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 SENT, SENS}
  \wordsense{a. 明智的；适当的；实用的}
  \wordexample{sensibly（明智地）}
  \wordexample{sensible ideas（明智的想法）}
  \wordexample{sensible woman（明智的女子）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[***]{sensitive}{ˈsensətɪv}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 SENT, SENS}
  \wordsense{a. 敏感的；神经过敏的；易生气的；（仪表）灵敏度高的；（胶卷等）感光的}
  \wordexample{sensitivity（敏感性；灵敏度）}
  \wordexample{sensitize（使变得敏感；使具有感光性）}
  \wordexample{sensitive to light（对光敏感的）}
  \wordexample{sensitive skin（敏感性皮肤）}
  \wordexample{sensitive nerve in a tooth（牙齿的敏感神经）}
  \wordexample{sensitive to criticism（对批评敏感的）}
  \wordexample{cf. oversensitive（过分敏感的）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[**]{sensory}{ˈsensəri}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 SENT, SENS}
  \wordsense{a. 感觉的；传递感觉的}
  \wordexample{sensory organs（感觉器官）}
  \wordexample{sensory nerves（感觉神经）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[**]{sensual}{ˈsenʃuəl}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 SENT, SENS}
  \wordsense{a. 肉体的；性感的；沉溺于感官享受的，耽于酒色的}
  \wordexample{sensuality（好色；喜爱感官享受）}
  \wordexample{sensualism（感觉论；肉欲主义）}
  \wordexample{sensualist（好色之徒）}
  \wordexample{sensual enjoyment（肉体的欢愉）}
  \wordexample{sensual life（耽于酒色的生活）}
  \wordexample{sensual lips（性感的嘴唇）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[**]{sensuous}{ˈsenʃuəs}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 SENT, SENS}
  \wordsense{a. 感观的；给感官以快乐的}
  \wordexample{sensuous music（悦耳的音乐）}
  \wordexample{sensuous paintings（悦目的绘画）}
\end{word}

\begin{word}[**]{sensibility}{ˌsensəˈbɪləti}
  \wordbreakdown{词根 SENT, SENS}
  \wordsense{n. 感觉（力）；敏感}
  \wordexample{sensibility of a poet（诗人的敏感）}
